programme.desc: Discover the white wolf, one of the most hardened predators on the planet, in Ellesmere Island's unforgiving ice and snow. In a fight for survival, these roaming hunters must travel far from the den to feed their cubs, putting them at risk.

programme.title: Nova: Mysteries of Sleep
programme.desc: Peer more deeply into the sleeping brain, discovering just how powerful sleep can be, playing a role in everything from memory retention and emotional regulation to removing waste from our brains.

programme.title: Sit and Be Fit: Tone and Stretch
programme.desc: Mary Ann uses a towel, large ball and weights to guide viewers through a full body workout.

programme.title: Arthur: Prunella's Special Edition/ The Secret Life of Dogs & Babies
programme.desc: The latest Henry Skreever book is finally in stores. Everybody in town is lining up to get it except Prunella, who's ordered a monogrammed limited edition, coming all the way from England. She is surprised when she is sent a Braille version instead.

programme.title: Ready Jet Go!: Beep and Boop's Game/ Constellation Prize
programme.desc: The kids help with Mars Rover BOOP, and learn about how scientists communicate with rovers far away.

programme.title: Nature Cat: Mud Love/ Call It a Night
programme.desc: To bring Hal's dream of Mud Appreciation Day to fruition, all his pals must lend a muddy hand.

programme.title: Splash and Bubbles: The House Hunt/ Dolphin Games
programme.desc: Splash, Bubbles and their best friends Dunk and Ripple go on epic adventures.

programme.title: Molly of Denali: Winter Champions/ Hus-Keys
programme.desc: Molly and the gang organize an outhouse race to determine who will become 'Winter Champions.' Now they just have to figure out how to build an outhouse and keep it from tipping over.

programme.title: Xavier Riddle and the Secret Museum: I Am Mark Twain/ I Am Abigail Adams
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of Xavier, Yadina, & Brad as they travel back to meet famous heroes.

programme.title: Let's Go Luna!: More Than All That Jazz/ Swamp Pals
programme.desc: In New Orleans, musician Carmen learns about something new: Jazz improvisation.

programme.title: Peg + Cat: Yet Another Tree Problem/ The Romeo and Juliet Problem
programme.desc: Peg is stuck up in the tree and Cat must figure out how to get her down by making a ladder out of found objects.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood: Prince Wednesday's Happy Birthday/ Daniel's Happy Song
programme.desc: Daniel's happy to be with friends at Prince Wednesday's birthday party.

programme.title: Sesame Street: When You're a Vet
programme.desc: Abby and Elmo play veterinarians.

programme.title: Pinkalicious & Peterrific: The Legend of Pinkfoot/ Flossie the Mossling
programme.desc: At bedtime, Pinkalicious befriends an owl in her backyard. Soon, she and Owlivia are singing together. It's fun to have a nocturnal friend, until Pinkalicious realizes she isn't nocturnal and losing sleep.

programme.title: The Great British Baking Show: Biscuits and Traybakes
programme.desc: The remaining eight bakers are faced with biscuits and traybakes. The signature challenge requires that they produce their favourite traybake, offering Mary and Paul their twists on everything from bakewells to banoffees and brownies.

programme.title: Masterpiece Mystery!: Grantchester
programme.desc: A professor dies in a suspicious fall. A government agent warns Geordie to back off the case. Meanwhile, Sidney is warned off an old flame, but finds a new prospect.

programme.title: In Their Own Words: Queen Elizabeth II
programme.desc: Explore the Queen’s remarkable life, from her youth -- when few expected she’d ever wear the crown -- to her uncle's stunning abdication, her father’s coronation as King George VI, her experience during World War II and her sudden ascension and reign.

programme.title: The Lawrence Welk Show: Tribute to Swing and Sweet Bands
programme.desc: Ava Barber Lawrence salutes the wonderful music of the Big Bands. Things get underway with 'And the Angels Sing,' 'Got a Date With an Angel' and the Aldridge Sisters, and the Otwell Twins reprise the Andrew Sisters' hit 'Don't Sit Under the Apple Tree.'

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Wannabe
programme.desc: After a man flashes customers at an electronics store, it is discovered that someone matching his description recently raped three young girls. Captain Cragen sends a rookie cop out to arrest him, but later finds out the rookie has a secret.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Merchandise
programme.desc: When a young girl is hit by a car and killed, Dr. Warner rules it a homicide. She found that the girl was being starved and had recently given birth. The detectives follow some leads and learn that the girl was involved in a human trafficking ring.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Know It All
programme.desc: A man under investigation for rape and murder threatens to expose the secrets of those working the case.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: The Good Girl
programme.desc: Benson works to uncover a pregnant teenager's secret when she refuses the name the baby's father.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Assumptions
programme.desc: The SVU searches for two suspects spotted fleeing the scene after a Muslim woman is assaulted inside a synagogue. Meanwhile, Benson is dismayed to find Rob Miller is out on bail.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: End Game
programme.desc: When a teenager is found dead in the Hudson River, Lt. Benson suspects Rob Miller is behind the mysterious death but can’t prove it.

programme.title: The Sinner: Part IV
programme.desc: Ambrose pursues Jamie through New York City and tries to prevent another homicide.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Actual Physical Violence

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Climbing Into Bed

programme.title: The Sinner: Part IV
programme.desc: Ambrose pursues Jamie through New York City and tries to prevent another homicide.

programme.desc: Kensi and Deeks are sent undercover as a married couple when evidence points to a Russian sleeper cell in a suburban neighbourhood.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Talbott and Broider
programme.desc: A passive mother who has no problem allowing her three boys to rule the house with slap fights and pranks swap places with a militaristic mom who has rules for everything and everyone. She even makes her sons sign out the key to the bathroom.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Exactly one year after beginning an affair with his friend's wife, a man vanishes. It's not until 15 years and a metal detector later that investigators will uncover the truth behind the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: With no suspects or motives, investigators can't make sense of a murder when a young woman is found dead near the highway. A tiny piece of unique fibre on the victim's clothing will lead to the most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writer's Block
programme.desc: An architect became ill and died just before she was to testify in a criminal trial.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clean Getaway
programme.desc: An employee of a dry-cleaner was raped and murdered in the store with two eyewitnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fatal Fungus
programme.desc: In Cleveland, more than thirty cases of people suffering from bleeding lungs were reported in the span of a few months. Doctors had never seen anything like it, and searched frantically for the cause and a cure.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Examining the cyanide-laced Excedrin killings of 1986, where two people died. When the killer was caught, theirs was the first conviction after federal laws against product tampering were instituted after the Chicago Tylenol murders.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Trace
programme.desc: The deaths of a child and a truck driver in the same hospital on the same day are investigated to see if there is a link between them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Evidence
programme.desc: The shooting of a man during a hunting trip is reopened years after the incident, and the victim's hunting partner becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Telltale Tracks
programme.desc: Police found an abandoned car on the highway and assumed the driver had been the victim of a car-jacking. When they find the victim's body, unusual marks on her body lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ghost in the Machine
programme.desc: In May of 1999, a minister's wife died in the bathtub from being unconscious.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: On the Rocks
programme.desc: The naked body of a young woman is discovered in a remote area leading forensic investigators on a search for clues to her identity and the identity of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: A fire leads investigators to re-examine an unusual death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: For 18 years, a man who murdered his entire family successfully eluded the FBI. Investigators used art and forensic science to find the killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Raw Terror
programme.desc: The story of Damion Heersink, an eleven-year-old boy who almost died after eating an improperly cooked hamburger teeming with E-Coli, and the people who saved his life.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sealed With a Kiss
programme.desc: For more than a year, angry, hateful letters were sent to a first grade school teacher in a small town in Pennsylvania. When scientists analyzed the letters, they found evidence that the sender knew a lot about the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Postal Mortem
programme.desc: On October 15, 1985, two bombs rocked Salt Lake City and resulted in two deaths. A third explosion occurred the next day, but this time the victim survived. Police believed that the survivor is more than an innocent by-stander.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen in Time
programme.desc: A young women went missing for three years until someone called to report a suspicious truck in a driveway. The cold trail turned even colder when they found out what was being stored in the truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: Tracy Jo Shine grew up in a middle-class home in Houston, Texas. Unfortunately, when she attended a prestigious high school she began experimenting with drugs. When she went missing, her family suspected her new friends from school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: On a cold December night in 1993, Rose Larner stopped in a convenience store on her way to her boyfriend’s house. She was never seen or heard from again.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: When Cows Attack
programme.desc: The Raney family arrives at a homestead threatened by heat, coyotes and even cows. Yes, cows. Disaster strikes when Marty attempts to protect livestock with a massive build, and the race is on to finish the project before father Paul must leave for work.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Grizzly Bait
programme.desc: Arctic temperatures and a hungry grizzly wreak havoc on a struggling homestead. The Raneys leap to action with huge builds including a blacksmith shop, but tragedy strikes.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Trapped
programme.desc: An isolated road becomes a death trap when a medical emergency strikes a secluded homestead. The Raneys face their first ever failed rescue.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Surviving the Wild: Idaho Death Trap
programme.desc: With extra facts and bonus scenes: The Raneys use good old-fashioned ingenuity to help protect an Idaho family's flock from predators.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Burned Out
programme.desc: In Northern California, the Raneys give a masterclass on rebuilding from scratch when they come to the aid of the Olson-Wilcox family whose homestead was completely destroyed in a devastating wildfire.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Quake Shattered
programme.desc: After a devastating earthquake, Marty saves the Hartleys' log cabin from crumbling to the ground while Misty replaces a collapsed greenhouse and Matt constructs a brand new building for the family to start a diesel engine repair shop.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: California Cob House
programme.desc: A group of off-grid-living enthusiasts come together to build a 300-square-foot bungalow. With a variety of eco-friendly features, including a solar-powered water pump, this house is a welcome addition to the environmentally friendly community.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Appalachian Underground
programme.desc: A husband surprises his wife with a family vacation home on the edge of a Tennessee rock quarry.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Flood, Sweat, and Tears: Part Two
programme.desc: Marty's dam is put to the test as the Raneys move an entire cabin into the flood zone. A surprise arrival of chicks has Misty needing an upgrade for her chicken coop. Matt crafts a knife blade in the Smiths' newly improved foundry.

programme.desc: A group of off-grid-living enthusiasts come together to build a 300-square-foot bungalow. With a variety of eco-friendly features, including a solar-powered water pump, this house is a welcome addition to the environmentally friendly community.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fighting for Fort Worth
programme.desc: The first Cash Days in Street Outlaws history hits the road in Fort Worth, Texas. Tensions are high as heavy hitters Barefoot Ronnie Pace, Boosted GT and Student Driver are all on hand to challenge the 405 for bragging rights and a shot at $12,000.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Baddest of the Southeast
programme.desc: The baddest street racers in the Southeast go head-to-head for $16,000 and the title of the region's fastest. Racers from the 405, Mississippi, California and Texas are ready to lay it all on the line but only one driver will walk away with the cash.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Only the Fastest
programme.desc: Street Outlaws history is made when 32 drivers compete for over $50,000 in the first-ever Cash Days in Oklahoma City. With a pot this big, tensions are running higher than ever and only the fastest of the fast will survive.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Rivalry Returns
programme.desc: Cash Days continues in Oklahoma City and the 16 remaining drivers are ready to hit the streets to finish what they started. Drivers from all over the country are still fighting for the big prize as heated rivalries only continue to get hotter.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Underwater Ghost Prison
programme.desc: An entrance to the underworld in the American wild, a haunting Soviet underwater prison, and a strange complex of towers in a forest of ice are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Amazon Ghost Town
programme.desc: An American ghost town in the Amazon jungle, a secret Nazi base, and a deadly concrete fortress 866 miles long are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Desert Ghost Fort
programme.desc: A secret Russian military base in the Gobi Desert, a strange complex in an American wasteland, and a relic high atop a mountain are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Tower of Death
programme.desc: Revealing how an alien Nazi structure that changed history, a strange Soviet monolith known as the Tower of Death, and a concrete ocean giant were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Alien Shrine
programme.desc: A strange alien shrine on a mountain peak, a bridge built in the Alaskan wilderness, and an American castle with a dangerous secret are mysterious deserted engineering projects and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of the Haunted Prison
programme.desc: A mysterious American pyramid built out of Cold War paranoia, a haunted prison, and a strange cluster of structures in the Atlantic are mysterious deserted engineering projects are investigated.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: World's Strangest Ghost Towns
programme.desc: The world's strangest ghost towns are home to dark secrets, creepy buildings, and eerie sights, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Last Chance Cut
programme.desc: Dave's entire season comes down to the final 24 hours and a bold risk that threatens to shut down his operation and force him out of the gold game for good.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Rocky Mountain Gold
programme.desc: Dave Turin and his crew kick off an epic new mining season in the historic hills of Montana. After a freak accident nearly derails their expedition from the start, they rally and find the first big gold of the season.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: I'm Dumbfounded
programme.desc: After years of hoarding, Vickie and Jeff's marriage is at its breaking point.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Bling It On!
programme.desc: Krystle wants to find the perfect dress for her wedding; Deshae is a Southern belle who's all about glitz, beads and sparkle.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Requests Like None of the Rest
programme.desc: Amanda is looking for a dress with tons of embellishment including sparkles and glitter.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Gown to Match My Black Heart

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Fixing Frankenstein
programme.desc: Dr. Schaeffer has to straighten a woman's serpentine foot to reset her life, as Dr. Vincent gets a drummer's foot back on the beat.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: This is Zit

programme.title: Yukon Men: Season of Change

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Uncuffed: Hot Pursuit
programme.desc: A shrimp boat is caught over the legal limit and goes on a hot pursuit, while a bobwhite quail is illegally kept in captivity. Later, a rattlesnake is found roaming a residential area, and wardens investigate an illegal goose kill.

programme.title: Snapped: Cynthia Mueller
programme.desc: When medical examiners determine that a terminally ill Arizona man may have not died from natural causes as his family previously thought, a homicide investigation begins to unravel the truth.

programme.title: Up and Vanished: The Vanishing Family
programme.desc: The mysterious disappearance of Korrina Malinoski, and daughter Annette, from their South Carolina home, has continued to baffle family and police for the past 30 years. Payne and team work to connect the clues and reunite a family in the process.

programme.title: Dateline: Mystery in Mustang
programme.desc: Keith Bryan is Mustang, OK's local heroic fireman. Having recently reconciled with his wife, life seems to be on the mend, until a brutal attack in his home leaves his dear wife a widower.

programme.title: Dateline: Broken Bonds
programme.desc: A quiet night was shattered when intruders terrorized a Florida couple and their young son, killing one of them. Investigators questioned the initial story. Then, a tip led them to another family with dark secrets, and that's when bonds were tested.

programme.title: Dateline: Mystery at Ascot Estates
programme.desc: When Brett Parker returned to his home in Charlston SC, he discovered the dead bodies of his beloved wife and her friend. At first, it seemed like a robbery gone wrong. However, a closer look at the clues reveals a much darker twisted tale.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Written In Blood
programme.desc: When Karen Pannell was found stabbed to death, a message scrawled in blood seemed like a beacon that could lead detectives to her killer. But what exactly did it mean? It would take a dogged forensic specialist with a keen eye to unravel the mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: At Close Range
programme.desc: Keith Reed was a highly-regarded school superintendent. When he didn't show up at an out-of-town conference, it set off alarm bells. Investigators took a hard look at his love life for clues and made a startling discovery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deep in the Woods
programme.desc: Kelli Bordeaux was just starting what she hoped to be a long career in the military, but fate had other plans. When she vanished, friends and family launched a frantic search, but it was stranger hell-bent on justice who uncovered the ugly truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Other Side of Paradise
programme.desc: Sandra Galas was born and raised in paradise. So how did something so ugly happen there? Police investigated two men in Sandra's life, but the case went cold. Her father refused to give up, relentlessly pursuing the truth for more than a decade.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Detour
programme.desc: Diane McIver was a successful businesswoman who enjoyed a lavish lifestyle with her husband. Then she was gone. It was a mystery riddled with privilege and power, but investigators needed to answer a crucial question: was this an accident or murder?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Threat
programme.desc: She was a divorced mother excited about her next chapter in life. Then, five gunshots shattered her plans. Proving who murdered Joan Lockwood was a daunting task for police. An ominous killer was still out there and her family was living in fear.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: What They Saw
programme.desc: Detectives believed two young children witnessed the unthinkable, the brutal murder of their mother. The prosecution's case would be built around what they thought those kids observed, but was another version of events possible?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Reckless
programme.desc: This is a story of teens, text messages and a complicated search for the truth. Conrad Roy had vanished. Turns out, he shared a secret with someone close to him. What that confidant did and did not do with the information shattered two families.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Inside the Hunt for El Chapo
programme.desc: For over a decade, El Chapo evaded authorities but one man was determined to catch the infamous kingpin. Former DEA agent Andrew Hogan comes out of the shadows to detail his search and capture with never-before-seen videos and photographs.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Angels & Demons
programme.desc: Angel's Landing was a community of free-spirits with Lou Castro at its center. Investigators were suspicious of the mysterious deaths happening there. Now, commune members have courageously decided to tell their stories in hopes of helping others.

programme.title: Movie: War for the Planet of the Apes

programme.desc: Stories on this episode include the face of Christ is found in a field in Hungary, a photo that claims to show who shot down a passenger jet in Ukraine and a sinister shape in the mountains of Afghanistan that leads investigators to a hidden genocide.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Secrets of the Sahara
programme.desc: In 1965, a beautiful 25 mile structure called the Eye of the Sahara was found from space. Its formation is still unknown. Then, a terrifying new weather weapon could be discovered from clouds emanating from an island in the Indian Ocean.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Finding Vietnam's Lost POWs
programme.desc: Stories on this episode include desperate signs from lost veterans in Vietnam captured by satellite, a fleet of massive ships stranded in the middle of a vast desert and strange walls stretching vast distances across Northern California.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hunt for El Dorado
programme.desc: Strange images from the jungles of Colombia could lead researchers to the legendary city of El Dorado. A bright green swirling spiral appears in the seas of the Persian Gulf. A massive complex suddenly appears secretive state of Myanmar.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Livestock Mutilation and Curse of the Ice Mummy
programme.desc: Horses and cattle around the world are found drained of blood. The German hiker who found the Neolithic ice mummy in the Alps is found frozen in a stream.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Omens of the Mothman
programme.desc: Joaquin V Gonzalez is a small town in northern Argentina. Two strange events make this a UFO hot spot. In 2009 a strange creature is seen in West Virginia and more than 10,000 people suffer from a strange disease.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Spontaneous Human Combustion and Mexican Pilot UFO
programme.desc: In Oklahoma, February 2013, a man is found completely incinerated to a pile of ashes in his own home. Pilot Carlos de los Santos was en route to Mexico City Airport when he was suddenly surrounded by three UFOs in the sky.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Valentich/ Texas Blue Dogs
programme.desc: A pilot and his light aircraft disappear from the skies above southern Australia in 1978. In Texas, blue-eyed and hunch backed creatures have mutilated livestock since 2004.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Lost Giants of Georgia and the Bridge of Death
programme.desc: In Borjami Valley, a team of experts uncover bones they believe belongs to a human that is over nine feet tall. Also, strange reports of a large, underwater creature have come from people living near the remote Lake Labynkyr in Siberia.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Death From the Sky and Mexican Chupacabra
programme.desc: In Britain, a missing man's body is found with electrocution burns and a green ointment on him, his case is mysteriously closed down. Plus, hundreds of vampire-like attacks in Mexico leave livestock drained of blood.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Alien Flights of Horror
programme.desc: Across America run-ins between planes and UFO's are reported, sometimes with terrifying and tragic consequences. Find out if there is danger in our skies and if the government is covering up the truth behind these encounters.

programme.title: Crime 360: Deadly Secrets
programme.desc: In Cleveland, Ohio, lead homicide detective Wally Everett and his partner Mike Smith are called out to a crime scene where a body lays hidden between some hedges and the victim's grandmother's house.

programme.title: Crime 360: Gilpin Court Shooting
programme.desc: Jaime is called to a possible homicide; learned victim ran 100 yards before dying. The victim banged on a couple of doors crying for help before falling down and dying.

programme.title: City Confidential: Deadly Odds in Biloxi
programme.desc: The shocking murders of attorney Vince Sherry and his politically active wife Margaret.

programme.title: City Confidential: Bad News in Battle Creek
programme.desc: Residents of a peaceful Michigan city are shocked when a local TV anchorwoman is murdered.

programme.title: City Confidential: Durham: Dangerous Housewife
programme.desc: A philandering and big-spending wife is suspected of killing her husband to get his money.

programme.title: American Justice: What Happened to Carrie Culberson?

programme.title: American Justice: Murder on the Boardwalk
programme.desc: Kosta Fotopoulos, a member of the Greek community in Daytona, invents a club for killers, and convinces his lover to kill a drifter so she can join.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Family Ties
programme.desc: Family bonds and family struggles take center stage when a man approaches Robb and Bethany and asks them to help find his missing daughter whom he fears is dead. The ROC squad set up a high-profile sting to capture a group of thieves preying on Tampa.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: Officers Roni and Cooper find themselves in a breathless foot chase after people are stabbed at a nightclub. Fire rescue's Doug and Stokes desperately try to save the life of a young man shot in his throat. A carjacking leads to a manhunt.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Catfish and Gators
programme.desc: When a vicious alligator attacks a dog, Deputy Melissa 'Catfish' Quintal calls in her alligator hunter boyfriend, Jacob Lirette, known as the 'Gator Man', to handle it. Also, deputies are sent in the dead of night to the eeriest bayous they've ever seen.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Full Moon Madness
programme.desc: Detectives try to track down a gang of thieves that are preying on empty camps in the deep bayou.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Hunt for the Swamp Monster
programme.desc: Sgt. Authement gets a call about a disturbance on a shrimping vessel, and calls in the SWAT team when he learns the captain has taken a deckhand hostage.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Swamp Manhunt
programme.desc: An armed and dangerous fugitive from another parish tries to make his escape in the swamps.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Bourgeois' Last Stand
programme.desc: Sheriff Vernon Bourgeois is weeks away from retiring, but he determines to take down a major copper theft ring that's been terrorizing his parish.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Bourgeois' Last Stand
programme.desc: Sheriff Vernon Bourgeois is weeks away from retiring, but he determines to take down a major copper theft ring that's been terrorizing his parish.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Stuck
programme.desc: Two inmates suffer life-threatening stab wounds during a melee on the exercise yard that involves two rival gangs.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Death Threat
programme.desc: The warden receives an anonymous letter from an inmate threatening to organize a group to attack correctional officers.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Bang Goes the Neighborhood
programme.desc: A couple who trades the city for the country soon find themselves in conflict with the gun shop owners across the street. Mutual video cameras record threats, fights and growing hostilities that finally lead to shots fired and blood spilled.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Boiling Point
programme.desc: Two women living next to each other in an apartment building become fast friends until becoming sworn enemies. Each enlists their sister as reinforcements in the escalating war between them; a conflict that ends in horrifically shocking violence.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: This Bullet's for You
programme.desc: A couple from Michigan realizes a long held dream when they relocate to Florida, but their life in the sun is destroyed when they get into a fatal conflict with their neighbour.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Not in My Yard
programme.desc: A rash of break-ins shatters the peace in a tight community, and when residents take sides along the fault lines; good friends turn into deadly enemies.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Screaming Oaks
programme.desc: An army vet goes out of his way to make his neighbors feel welcome, but when a child's birthday gift goes missing; it only takes 37 days for the friendships to end in a killing spree.

programme.title: Man With a Van: Handsome Devil
programme.desc: Kenia Monge spends her week days studying and her weekends partying with friends. When she disappears from a downtown Denver nightclub after a night of drinking and dancing, Kenia wanders the streets without purse or phone and encounters a man with a van.

programme.title: Welcome to the Murderhood
programme.desc: A fun-loving and outgoing single mother looking for a fresh start meets her untimely death when she moves to a new town in California.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Devil at the Crossroads
programme.desc: 11-year-old Shauna Howe disappears as she returns home from a girl scouts Halloween party. When Shauna's body shows up in a local creek, her murder ignites an investigation, whose conclusion will send shockwaves through her community.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Screaming Oaks

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: Vanishing on I-95
programme.desc: A woman driving solo to visit a friend on Florida's I-95 mysteriously vanishes. Her divorce leads police one way, but when her body is found it suggests something horribly different. Another woman who reads about the case has a hunch she knows the killer.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: New Mexico Desert Killings
programme.desc: When a young woman vanishes from a New Mexico convenience store, two detectives discover tracks in the dirt that may lead them to answers. After a second woman disappears, it's a race against time to stop a potential serial killer.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: Gulf Coast Vanishings
programme.desc: In Southwest Florida, Terrance Williams, a young father, disappears. As his mother retraces his steps she uncovers something ominous: the last known person to see Terrance alive has a strange and disturbing connection to another missing man.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: Never Stop Looking
programme.desc: Ruth Vosseler's estranged husband takes their two young sons on an overnight trip in 1986, but they never return. Ruth's frantic search for her fugitive ex-husband and two young boys spans 28 years and unearths dark family secrets.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: Tattooed in Memory
programme.desc: Kidnapped just steps from her home, a 15-year-old girl is brutally assaulted and left for dead in Denver's South Platte River.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Boiling Point
programme.desc: A beautiful face can mask the ugliest of intentions.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Mom's Money
programme.desc: Most children value their mother's enduring love, but few are only concerned with a different kind of maternal support: money. These Deadly Women prove all they care about is ''Mom's Money''.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Killer Cougars
programme.desc: Some women can't resist bad boys, but when the fur flies, these women reveal their deadly side.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Two to Terminate
programme.desc: When it came to murder, these women thought two minds were better than one. They were the masterminds, but didn't want to get their hands dirty. For these Deadly Women, it took 'Two to Terminate.'

programme.title: Dateline: Shattered Bonds
programme.desc: Stephen Moore was a speed skater with little direction in life, until he fell for teacher Kathleen Dorsett. When he went missing, it was a puzzle. Then police found his secret audio diary. Clues came pouring out and a bigger mystery was revealed.

programme.title: Dateline: While He Was Sleeping
programme.desc: When a successful luxury car dealer is murdered in his sleep, detectives soon focus in on one of the victim’s many lovers. But with little hard evidence to go on, the investigation stalls – until a year later.

programme.title: Dateline: A Perfect Spot
programme.desc: A romantic Valentine's Day tryst for a Georgia couple takes a deadly turn. Investigators find themselves stumped until evidence of tire treads at the crime scene and a string of cell phone calls reveal a twisted plot of deceit and murder.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Arnold 'The Brain' Rothstein
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and set the model for running a crime business.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Santo Trafficante
programme.desc: Florida and Cuba were ruled by top don Santo Trafficante. The King of Cuba's casinos was on the verge of mob stardom when a revolution destroyed his plans. It results in a secret alliance between the mob and the CIA and a failed assassination attempt.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Albert Anastasia
programme.desc: As the head of Murder, Inc. Albert Anastasia would oversee the American Mafia's most violent period in history. He was unpredictable, a psychopath who would eventually outlive his usefulness.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Dutch Schultz
programme.desc: In the lawless days of Prohibition America, one gangster stands out as the black sheep Dutch Schultz. When Dutch threatens to kill a state prosecutor, the mob can't risk the fallout, so they send Dutch a special message: a body full of lead.

programme.title: Mafia vs. KKK
programme.desc: The amazing story of the hidden war between two of the United States most violent groups, the mafia and the Ku Klux Klan.

programme.title: Hidden History of the Moon Landing
programme.desc: The amazing, untold story of how President Lincoln initiated a series of events that culminated in the moon landing.

programme.title: Hollywood vs. Commies
programme.desc: The amazing story of how Hollywood took on Communism and played a key role in winning the Cold War.

programme.title: Nazis vs. Aliens
programme.desc: The incredible story of how Nazi scientists and UFOs combined to create technology that changed the world.

programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Demon Doctor
programme.desc: Known for his dubious medical practices and shady financial deals, the Nazi occupation liberated Dr. Marcel Petio's murderous instincts, enabling him to embark on a shocking killing spree.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Godfather of London
programme.desc: Billy Hill was the most powerful Kingpin in Britain's post-war underworld, but the secret behind Hill's empire is little known.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma
programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Papa Doc: Haiti's President for Life
programme.desc: Francois Duvalier trained as a medical doctor, but his healing touch was lost as he became the ruthless dictator 'Papa Doc.' The tools of his tyranny were violence and Voodoo. He killed 30,000 people, and kept a nation in fear of his mystical powers.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Keep Calm and Karrie On
programme.desc: Two sisters take on a dilapidated house in Seguin, Texas, with moldy walls, a leaky roof and a bad odor. While safety and power tools may not be their strongest attributes, the two work to turn the grimy property into a livable space for potential buyers.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: All Play, No Flip
programme.desc: A real estate agent and her energetic husband start their first flip in Jackson, Tennessee. Surprise structural damage, electrical problems and mold turn a one-month project into a ten-month ordeal.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Stilts and Stones May Break the Budget
programme.desc: Husband and wife flipping team, Christine and Greg, decide to flip an enormous house by the beach in southern New Jersey. The flip starts to spiral out of control when Christine's expensive taste interferes with Greg's strict budget.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: A Family That Flips Together
programme.desc: When Brandon found out that his mother and stepfather were going to flip a house, he decided to go to real estate school and invest in their flip. Brandon may be the baby of the family, but he knows a lot. He struggles to get his parents to listen to him.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Flipping in the Big Easy
programme.desc: Two friends and stay-at-home moms decide to flip their first house together in New Orleans, Louisiana, but their conflicting design styles and schedule test the limits of their friendship. They'll have to find a way to compromise to finish on time.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Upstate Upset
programme.desc: A husband and wife take on an enormous house in upstate New York for their first flip. Even with a background in construction, they find themselves overstressed and out of luck when the project is delayed by several months.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Momma Knows Best
programme.desc: A college student enlists the help of her mother while flipping a house in Connecticut for money to pay for her tuition. The mother is worried her daughter's social life will distract her from pulling her weight in the project.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Home Is Where the Hearth Is
programme.desc: A couple decides to flip a house they have admired for years in Henderson, TX. But, when their timeline extends beyond their expectations, they are forced to move into the active renovation site in order to keep things moving and cut costs.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Playing Catch Up
programme.desc: All three builds are running behind schedule and must rush to get ahead. John and Heather build a water catchment system but discover they aren't getting enough water pressure, Chris Maynard's windows are delivered by helicopter in strong winds.

programme.title: Building Alaska: A Fort in the Woods
programme.desc: John and Heather's build is put on pause as they try to figure out how to install their drywall without covering their timber frame.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the YMCA
programme.desc: The Kennebec Valley YMCA in Augusta, Maine needs a new play structure and the Cabin Masters know just the crew for the job! Ryan decides to build a workshop for Chase. The team works feverishly to finish both projects before everything freezes over.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Past, Present and Future
programme.desc: A couple's Belle Island camp has a long multi-generational history within their family spanning nearly 100 years. Their camp is an ongoing focus of family life and they are now ready to make its preservation their main priority.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Kansas City Outdoor Room
programme.desc: Yard Crashers is in Kansas City, Missouri, where a rotten deck in a hot and very small backyard is transformed into a quaint outdoor living room.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Transforming a Shipping Container Into a Portable Barnwood Cabin
programme.desc: Mark and the guys turn a used shipping container into a portable barnwood cabin. They use welding torches and old logs to transform the steel container into a home. Mark searches for the perfect red barnwood to cover it.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Turning a West Virginia Smokehouse Into a Modern Bunkhouse in the Florida Swamp
programme.desc: Mark and the guys take down a West Virginia smokehouse and a half-barn nearby. They weave the logs together in Florida to create a bunkhouse for their client's kids.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Wading With Alligators to Build a Two-Story Hunting Lodge in Florida
programme.desc: Mark and the guys take the bones of an old Virginia log home down to Florida, where they turn it into a two-story hunting lodge. Mark makes mouth blown wavy glass for the windows, and dives in an alligator pond to get some long leaf pine for the floors.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Moving a Pre-Civil War Log Cabin From West Virginia to Tennessee
programme.desc: Mark and the guys take down a pre-Civil War log cabin in Braxton County, West Virginia. They take it back to Lewisburg to refurbish the logs, then rebuild it for a client who collects historic homes in Elizabethton, Tennessee.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Moving the Last Cabin in Roanoke to a Local Resort
programme.desc: Mark and the guys go way beyond the call of duty to save the last cabin from the old town of Roanoke, West Virginia. The Fox sisters show up and to watch their father's boyhood home get moves to a local four-diamond resort.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Grandma's Cabin
programme.desc: Mark and the guys save the logs from a fire-damaged home in West Virginia. Mark promises the family who sold him the cabin that he will honor their history here. Once the logs are salvaged, the cabin is rebuilt on the Boneyard for a client in Montana.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Thin-Skinned
programme.desc: Mark has a Montana client who wants to give a modern home a classic log cabin look. The guys build a cabin facade using antique log veneers. They also use more log veneers to create a new piece for the Barnwood Showroom. Mark then tours a beautiful home.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Old-School Takedown in Harrisville, WV
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders turn to the old-school method of using ropes to take down a log cabin in Harrisville, West Virginia. Later on, they shop at the oldest five-and-dime in America, and meet some modern day pioneers who hewed their own log cabin by hand.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Stubborn as a Mule
programme.desc: The builders save a barn that once housed mules in the iron-mining boomtown of Low Moor, VA. As they work, they find evidence of the barn's industrial past. Later, Mark visits a timber frame that's been converted into a wedding venue.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Rowdy with a Chance of Meatballs
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Arkansas State Fair in Little Rock to discover a few brand-new favourites. In addition to the eponymous Arkanstick and rolled ice-cream treat known as the Rainbow Roll there are also deep-fried Pina Coladas.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: There's Something About Cherry
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives in Macon, Georgia, for the International Cherry Blossom Festival and some of the prettiest, pinkest carnival treats around.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Seoul Dip Sisters
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets festive at the California Mid-Winter Fair and Fiesta! He's sampling the Seoul Dip- a Korean twist on the French Dip- then keeps things spicy with the Diablo Dog before going for a sweet finish with the Supreme Samoa doughnut stack.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Devil Wears Pasta
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets things started in Florida at the Okeechobee County Fair where he samples the Hot Wing Grilled Cheese, the Sweet Bacon Devil Burger and the made-in-Florida Strawberry Margarita Funnel Cake.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Layers Of Goodness
programme.desc: Get ready to pile it on thick as we're talking layers of goodness that are stacked to the ceiling. We take a trip to Chicago where we meet up with Jeff Mauro to discover all the magic colors hidden inside the rainbow cake.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Hole Truth (Donuts)
programme.desc: Alton Brown takes us on a trip to Memphis to honor the original glazed doughnut that started it all.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Worth the Wait
programme.desc: Alton Brown talks up his favorite beef Wellington, while Jamika Pessoa melts over buttery biscuits.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Borrowed Favourites
programme.desc: Sharing is caring, and the treats that family and friends love become personal favourites too! Robert Irvine takes his wife's advice and discovers the world's greatest omelet at Babystacks Cafe in Las Vegas, Nev.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Minneapolis, MN
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Minnesota's largest city, where he tries a legendary burger that's become a regional icon, noshes on a gigantic brunch meal served with its own food Ferris wheel and takes on a massive four-pound banh mi behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Saint Paul, MN
programme.desc: Casey's latest delicious detour brings him to Saint Paul for an indoor food truck park, a timeless diner and a terrible twosome of crepes and Thai rolled ice cream.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Wilmington, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary adventures take him to the port city of Wilmington, North Carolina, for a barbecue bonanza, a totally bonkers burrito and a big, bad behemoth in the undefeated Pierogi Team Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charlotte, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb charges into Charlotte, North Carolina, for three takes on Southern specialties. There's a cheesy chicken classic care of Korea, a time-honored institution's signature sandwich and the biggest walking taco in all the Carolinas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Buttered Up
programme.desc: Chefs and food experts are revealing the richest, creamiest buttery dishes out there. Alex Guarnaschelli brings on the butter with a one-of-a-kind shrimp-and-grits combo from Tillie's in Short Hills, New Jersey.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Stretchy Pants Required
programme.desc: America's best dishes just might burst your buttons. Anne Burrell faces off against a gut-busting club sandwich from Little Goat Diner in Chicago while Antonia Lofaso ventures to the heart of Los Angeles for heavy-hitting Korean barbecue at Park's BBQ.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On a Date
programme.desc: Birds are chirping, flowers are blooming, bellies are full and love is in the air. Celebrate the best meals for any romantic occasion. Alex Guarnaschelli wines and dines with the most amazing gnocchi ever made in New York City.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chocolate Bliss

programme.title: Lab Rats: Bionic Showdown

programme.title: DuckTales: The Richest Duck in the World!
programme.desc: Louie, Scrooge, and Owlson must escape from an unstoppable monster cursed to hunt down and destroy the richest duck in the world.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Skunked/ Axin' Saxon
programme.desc: Cricket stages a crisis by letting skunks into the café, but it gets out of control. Nancy accidentally destroys Saxon, but Tilly mistakenly directs her wrath at Gramma.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Garage Tales/ Animal Farm
programme.desc: After finding a box of mementos, Gramma tells the kids the story of her greatest adventure. While the Greens are away, the animals compete to see who will rule the farm.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Gorytelling/ A Few Good Monsters
programme.desc: When Cornelius Shivers reveals that he's writing a book about the hotel, each member of the Dracula family hopes to outdo the others with their own story. After a family heirloom is destroyed, the children are considered the only suspects.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Four Monsters and a Funeral/ Rainbow Doom
programme.desc: Mavis has to hold a mock funeral after fibbing to Death and saying her Uncle Gene is dead. Mavis beats the video game, Rainbow Doom, using a cursed code, but the curse brings the game to life.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Supersonic Sue
programme.desc: Big Hero 6 attempt to thwart a bank robbery and are defeated by Supersonic Sue, an old school roller-skating villain.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Lie Detector
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Jack Takes a Tumble
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Last Crash of the Sunchaser!
programme.desc: Stuck on a precarious peak, the kids secretly search the plane for the final clue about Della's mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Duck Knight Returns!
programme.desc: When Scrooge and Dewey make a gritty Darkwing Duck movie, Launchpad teams up with the original Darkwing to stop it.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: DuckTales: Moonvasion!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Goblin War: Part Four
programme.desc: Spider-Man and his friends must stop the Goblin King before he destroys New York City.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Hiro The Villain
programme.desc: Momakase blackmails Hiro into helping her steal her family's knives from Yama's safe.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Reckoning Ball/ Clubbed
programme.desc: Chip Whistler returns to take revenge on the Greens, but is forced to apologize. Andromeda and Tilly follow Gloria to a club where they must 'cure' her of her amnesia.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Turbo: Secret of the Fused Bey!
programme.desc: Having discovered the fruits of Dr. Evel’s Blading research, Count Nightfell challenges Aiger to a friendly match.

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: The One that Didn't Get Away!

programme.desc: The team's participation in the annual Red Dress Run is cut short when a Petty Officer is found dead in the French Quarter from a drug overdose.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Broken Hearted

programme.title: Movie: Meet the Parents

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Truth Will Out

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Nice and Easy

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Operation

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Second Motherhood
programme.desc: Blanche is romanced by a wealthy suitor who she learns has several small children. This fact dampens his proposal of marriage. Meanwhile, Dorothy and Rose go to bat with the bathroom plumbing.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Adult Education
programme.desc: Blanche's psychology professor sexually harasses her when she goes to him for help on a difficult test. Blanche's professor makes her a harassing deal: If she has sex with him, he'll give her an 'A' for the exam.

programme.desc: Born with no arms, Linda and son Timothy Bannon share their story and dance with special guest, Mystic Bowie.

programme.title: Married at First Sight: The 'L Word'
programme.desc: Five couples grow toward love with their stranger spouse by planning romantic surprises.

programme.title: Movie: Revenge Porn
programme.desc: A teenager's life is turned upside down when a set of nude photos of her are sent out to everyone she knows and posted on a 'revenge porn' website. Her mother launches an investigation into the owner of the site and plans the ultimate takedown.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Sister
programme.desc: As a top student at St. Adeline's Catholic Boarding School, Zoe senses that something is not quite right about the school's new nun, a sense proven to be true when it is revealed the ‘good’ nun is an imposter with a fatal attraction to Zoe's brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: On the Rocks
programme.desc: The naked body of a young woman is discovered in a remote area leading forensic investigators on a search for clues to her identity and the identity of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value, and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bio-Attack
programme.desc: A religious cult's bizarre plot to overthrow the government using germ warfare.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A woman is found dead of a gunshot wound and police conclude that she was murdered by her husband. Forensic scientists were able to piece together the clues and determine what really happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shopping Spree
programme.desc: A mother and her daughter leave home for a day of shopping, but never return. The little girl's body was found dumped off of a roadside, but there was no sign of her mother. Forensic science determined if the baby's mother was a suspect or a victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Cheater
programme.desc: Little did Walter Scott of the band 'Bob Kuban and the In-Men' know that their 1966 hit-single 'The Cheater' would foreshadow the events that would lead to his demise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Accident or Murder?
programme.desc: Police believed that a husband murdered his wife after they learn that he had taken out a life insurance policy on her shortly before she died. When an investigator recreates the fall, the results are surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Core Evidence
programme.desc: When a 16-month-old baby dies, tests discover e. coli in her system. Eventually the bacteria are traced back to a fruit juice manufacturer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treading Not So Lightly
programme.desc: When a four-year-old girl is found unconscious in a parking lot, police concluded it was a hit and run vehicle accident, and left it at that. But the girl's mother was determined to find out exactly what had happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Forever Hold Your Peace
programme.desc: When a young man confessed to the rape and murder of a woman in a restaurant, police were convinced the case was solved. Eight years later, another man imprisoned for an unrelated crime, admitted he committed the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: A fire leads investigators to re-examine an unusual death.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: On the Rocks
programme.desc: The naked body of a young woman is discovered in a remote area leading forensic investigators on a search for clues to her identity and the identity of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Micro-Clues
programme.desc: When a boy is found dead in a cornfield, traces of water from his body help lead investigators to the boy's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Parasites
programme.desc: In the spring of 1993, an unexplained illness struck the residents of Milwaukee, Wisconsin. Health officials suspected it was influenza, but it proved to be more serious and more difficult to identify.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Touching Recollection
programme.desc: An eighteen-year-old girl is abducted at gunpoint from her home in Jackson, Ohio. Fortunately the victim returns hours later, and police hope the tire impressions and shoe prints at the crime scene will enable them to find the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg to Stand On
programme.desc: Police investigate when a severed leg is found in the garbage. When they realize they can't use conventional techniques to catch the killer, police must use scientific techniques like DNA testing and toxicology reports to find him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Bond
programme.desc: The story of nurse Tanya Reid who may have murdered her own baby and was planning to murder her son.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: On a cold December night in 1993, Rose Larner stopped in a convenience store on her way to her boyfriend’s house. She was never seen or heard from again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Disappearance of Helle Crafts
programme.desc: A flight attendant was reported missing from her home after hiring an investigator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Footpath Murders
programme.desc: British detectives teamed up with a pioneering scientist to crack a case of sexual assault and serial murder. This 1986 case marked the first time DNA was used as evidence in a court of law.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Fog
programme.desc: Investigators set out to determine if the dense, thick fog that caused the deadliest automobile accident on American history was a natural phenomenon, or the result of something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sex, Lies and DNA
programme.desc: While Earl Morris was vacationing in California, he learned his wife had gone missing from their home in Arizona. The search for Ruby Morris involved dozens of investigators and scientists, even the coast guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: A woman is found beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped outside of Phoenix. The nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer than any other single piece of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: A fire leads investigators to re-examine an unusual death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shopping Spree
programme.desc: A mother and her daughter leave home for a day of shopping, but never return. The little girl's body was found dumped off of a roadside, but there was no sign of her mother. Forensic science determined if the baby's mother was a suspect or a victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Cheater
programme.desc: Little did Walter Scott of the band 'Bob Kuban and the In-Men' know that their 1966 hit-single 'The Cheater' would foreshadow the events that would lead to his demise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bag of Evidence
programme.desc: When a 9-year old girl disappears, an anonymous caller leads police to her body.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: On the Rocks
programme.desc: The naked body of a young woman is discovered in a remote area leading forensic investigators on a search for clues to her identity and the identity of her killer.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Two of America’s premier pornographers happen to be brothers. When one turns up dead, his brother confesses to shooting him. The question for investigators is whether the shooting was pre-meditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pastoral Care
programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Payback
programme.desc: In 1993 a 20 year old boy is found beaten to death and murdered in Florida. Soon, a bizarre story unfolds of sex, jealousy, and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Dirty Deed
programme.desc: Eileen and Derrick Severs disappeared from their home in the small village of Hambleton in Great Britain, and police found evidence which suggested foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: A fire leads investigators to re-examine an unusual death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: An unknown assailant walked into a retail store and fired three shots, killing the owner. Police had suspects, but all of them had alibis.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker Doubles Down
programme.desc: Parker makes a big move to double his output to bring in more gold. The Beets face a catastrophe when their remaining operation grinds to a halt. Fred fires his dredge back up and lands his biggest gold haul yet. Dustin faces an uncertain future.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Rebellion at Duncan Creek
programme.desc: A machine failure leads to an explosive uprising on Rick's claim. Parker's crew races to build a mountain of pay dirt. Fred taps out Thunder Falls with his biggest gold haul. Dustin hits the nugget jackpot. The Dirt returns with the Milwaukee boys.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Frozen Treasure
programme.desc: A huge mistake threatens Rick's operation and Monica hopes her ground has thawed.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Pay Dirt: Bring in the Big Guns
programme.desc: With insider facts and bonus scenes: Rick confronts his landowners, and Tony makes a big investment. Parker embarks on a search for new ground.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Rally in the Valley
programme.desc: Rick hits a gold layer that may save his season. Parker's crew takes big risks in Death Valley. Tony turns a corner. Dave Turin is forced to troubleshoot when thick clay in the paydirt clogs the sluice. The top lieutenants take over the Dirt.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters: Against All Odds
programme.desc: Rookie Justin ropes in a stranger in a mad dash to get his excavator across a busy highway. Opal Queen Kelly battles a new claim with a new partner. Then, with Col struck down with illness, Aaron and Greg must push on at Dragonfly without him.

programme.title: River Of No Return: Roaring Back To Life
programme.desc: As the winter ice thaws, Idaho's River of No Return flows, and the people living on its violent shores navigate the raging spring rapids. The small community hustles to work, so they can survive another season in this rugged and dangerous backcountry.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Fire of the Gods
programme.desc: Josh Gates explores places where destruction and creation exist in breathtaking concert, from the legendary Chernobyl nuclear power plant in Ukraine to a Spanish festival that culminates with a citywide inferno.

programme.title: The Scott Martin Challenge: Charlotte Harbor Switching Gears
programme.desc: Capt. Brock Horner must keep switching gears to pull of a multi species challenge.

programme.title: The Experience: Mike Huckabee-American Politician; Rich Picciotto– Hero Part 2
programme.desc: Weston and Governor Mike Huckabee take hero Richard Piccioto on a duck hunt in Arkansas.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: 50,000 Reasons to Win

programme.title: Addictive Fishing: Redfish Fever
programme.desc: Blair and Capt. Chris Pike fish for redfish at Lake Borgne out of Louisiana.

programme.title: The Next Bite: Sauger Wars: Vertical Jigging on the Illinois River
programme.desc: On the Illinois River in late fall, anglers Chase Parsons, Tom Kemos, and Jim Schiefelbein explore vertical jigging for sauger.

programme.title: Out Da Bayou: Blue Ridge Rainbows
programme.desc: The ODC Crew head to a town for a fly fishing dream trip.

programme.title: Chasin' the Sun: Puzzle Plans
programme.desc: Justin and DOA pro Ed Zyak test new lures in Panama City Beach. Travis visits an escape room.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Mosquito Control Officer
programme.desc: Mike has got his work cut out for him as he begins gutting mold infested houses and exterminating disease ridden rats and mosquitos. Mike gets dirty helping New Orleans locals restore, rebuild and revive their city in the aftermath of Katrina's wrath.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Sled Dog Breeder
programme.desc: Mike finds out what it takes to breed sled dogs at the Happy Trails Kennel in Alaska.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Bug Detective
programme.desc: Mike joins the team at Purdue University's DECOMP Forensic Entomology Lab as they dig through pig carcasses searching for maggots and other insects.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Toilet Crusher
programme.desc: Mike heads to Arkansas to perform tests on Alligator Snapping Turtles, the he heads to San Francisco where he removes and recycles toilets.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Wetland Warrior
programme.desc: Mike travels to Texas to work as a stand-in fugitive while attempting to outsmart a team of bloodhounds and evade being captured. Then he heads to the Florida Everglades to help combat non-native, invasive species in the marshlands.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Woolen Mill Operator
programme.desc: Mike spends a day working at Ohio Valley Natural Fibers where he makes yarn from fleece. Then he goes to work at a day spa in Michigan where he helps wax hair off of his good friend Barsky.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Cave Digger
programme.desc: Mike helps dig tunnels that are used as underground wine caverns. Then Mike travels to the airport where he does the dirty jobs behind the scenes.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: As Bad As It Gets
programme.desc: After more than twenty years in the same apartment, compulsive hoarder Randy is being forced to leave by order of his landlord, and must somehow clear out the eight-foot-high mountains of stuff in a few days.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: You're Making Me Blush
programme.desc: Kara fell in love with a statement red dress at another salon, but her future mother-in-law has more traditional gown ideas. Sheena needs a colourful dress to wear to her Indian wedding reception. Later, Tamara tries on her dress for the first time.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Family Rules
programme.desc: Tanya brings her outspoken family to help her find a blush-coloured dress. Mary Beth, who has ovarian cancer, is excited to dress shop with three generations of family members. Stella decides to bring only her mother to her first fitting.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Cheetah Bride
programme.desc: Sabrina Bryan of 'The Cheetah Girls' has a dress-shopping date with designer Hayley Paige and one of Kleinfeld's own consultants is going to be a bride herself!

programme.desc: Ed, Avery, Geoffrey, Lisa, Stephanie, Yolanda and David are on a mission to meet their overseas soulmates in person for the very first time. Nothing can stop them from seeing if their dreams of love can become reality, and Darcey returns for some answers.

programme.title: Counting On: Unexpected
programme.desc: Newly-expectant parents, Joe and Kendra, check up on their baby. The little girls record an album in Nashville. Josiah takes Lauren's siblings out for ice cream.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Shocking!
programme.desc: A pianist's finger is accidentally sawed off and missing until his wife and dog come to the ER. A man's pacemaker is killing him, yet keeping him alive, and after his bachelor party, a nurse's fiancé is behaving bizarrely.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Rottweiler in the ER
programme.desc: While a shooting victim is brought to the hospital, a Rottweiler gets loose in the ER. A young mother's asthma attack turns quickly into a deadly heart failure. A young man comes into the ER comatose, covered with a mysterious rash.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: I Can't Remember
programme.desc: A patient can't remember what happened in the past 20 years. An asthma patient runs away but returns in handcuffs.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Stabbed in the Heart
programme.desc: A stabbing victim's heart has a hole in it and must be pumped by hand to keep him alive.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Chocolate Pudding
programme.desc: Meet a psychiatric patient who has an extreme love of chocolate pudding, while another patient in anaphylactic shock may be allergic to his girlfriend. Meanwhile, a man with a bizarrely swollen face must be convinced to get treatment.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Dumpster Smash
programme.desc: A man smashed by a dumpster clings to life; an elderly nun and a drunken prostitute are in the ER at the same time; a woman suffering an apparent stroke may have a deadly rare virus, but her medical intern son doesn't agree with the doctor's suspicions.

programme.desc: Farmer bride Katie's stylist sister convinced Katie to ditch her jeans and cowboy boots for a wedding gown for her special day. Courtney's looking for a flashy ball gown. Jennifer vowed to lose a lot of weight, so she ordered her dress a size too small.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: His Opinion...
programme.desc: Taylor brought her fiancé to help her find her dream gown. Brandi shops with her fiancé because she needs his approval.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Expecting Brides

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Image Is Everything
programme.desc: Randy's day is nonstop as he assists brides and auditions models for his runway show. Bride Emanuela wants a sexy ball gown and she's not afraid to throw her dad's budget out the window. Marlena is finally dress shopping for a wedding years in the making.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Race Against Time

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Red She Said

programme.desc: Indian bride Rashi wants an Americanized gown for her wedding reception.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Real Deal Fast Food
programme.desc: Guy tracks down some great places that prove fast food can also be great food.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Neighborhood Favorites
programme.desc: Guy visits restaurants in Santa Fe and Salt Lake City.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Family, All the Time
programme.desc: Guy heads to places where families rule, including a Hawaiian Thai spot.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Food Done Right
programme.desc: Guy's diggin' into food made the right way, including clam cakes and cheesefries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: One Street Wonders
programme.desc: This trip, Guy is heading to Cincinnati to try three righteous restaurants all on the same street. He checks out The Funky Pub where they're serving up all kinds of hot dogs and sammies.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cruisin' the Italian Countryside
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's taking a tasty tour through Tuscany, Italy. In Montecatini Alto, a hillside seafood spot serves up a squid ink specialty and a Mediterranean prawn-artichoke mash up.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Bite of Britain
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's livin' it up in London, digging into a real-deal regional feast. First, a couple of British buddies smoke up true blue American 'cue. Then, a hip hangout gives classic fish-n-chips a modern makeover.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Homeland Favorites
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's celebrating homeland favorites from all kinds of diverse cultures. In Richfield, Minn., the Mexican restaurant-market combo dishing out real-deal tacos al pastor and carnitas tamales.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Culinary Journey
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's hitting the road for on an off-the-chain culinary journey. On the Big Island, a Filipino-Hawaiian mashup making a name for leaving diners speechless.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Kinds of Meat
programme.desc: Guy's digging into a meat lover's paradise. In Colorado Springs, a Jamaican joint dishes out killer curry goat and jammin' jerk chicken. In Baltimore, a funky beer bar serves up wild boar sliders and outrageous pork belly mac and cheese fries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Italian, Thai and Pie
programme.desc: Guy Fieri has a righteous time revisiting joints offering everything from pie to Thai. In Honolulu, a family spot going strong with their specialties straight out of Thailand.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Handy Helpings
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri grabs a fistful of righteous hand-held toppings starting with a kolach cafe in Salt Lake City cooking up their Czech specialties with some sweetness and comfort.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Piling on the Pork
programme.desc: Guy is digging in and pigging out on this trip starting with a Puerto Rican spot in San Antonio that's building a unique take on nachos and cooking up a monster chop. In New Orleans, a gangster grill serves up pork knuckles and some sweet bird.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Beef Bonanza
programme.desc: This time around, Guy Fieri's diving into a serious beef bonanza! In Wilmington, Delaware, there's a 1940s Italian family spot that's making beef braciole and meaty ravioli from scratch.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Legacies
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's visiting spots keeping up with their family ties. In Pleasantville, N.J., a wife carries on her husband's legacy with his down-home chicken and waffles and righteous ribs. In Colorado Springs, family recipes are made at a BBQ joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Global Goodies
programme.desc: Guy takes a walk down memory lane to check on some of his favorite DDD finds. He gets a second helping at his first Peruvian place in Chicago. In Seattle, tradition stands firm at an old school chili parlor. Plus, local dives in Minneapolis and Portland.
