programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Flood
programme.desc: The yearly flood of the Okavango Delta turns 4,000 square miles of arid plains into wetland.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Feast
programme.desc: Every summer in the seas off Alaska, humpback whales, sea lions and killer whales depend on an explosion of plant life: the plankton bloom. It transforms these seas into the richest on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Enchanted Kingdom
programme.desc: Narrated by Idris Elba, explore seven distinct worlds in the wildest continent on Earth, Africa, to discover that nature is so much more surprising and extraordinary than ever imagined.

programme.title: Lockup: Oakland Extended Stay: Getting Schooled
programme.desc: One inmate learns addiction and motherhood do not make a good mix, while two others are left wondering which of them is the father of her child. Plus, when a feud from the streets boils over in the jail, deputies are forced to respond.

programme.title: Lockup: Oakland Extended Stay: Permanent Scars
programme.desc: An inmate says a bet for two cups of soup led to a horrific slashing; a case of road rage results in a murder charge for a software engineer, and now, after two years in jail, a jury will decide if he must go to prison for life.

programme.title: Lockup: Oakland Extended Stay: Wait of the World
programme.desc: A violent gang member asks to move back to general population, following six years in segregation; a brother and sister are charged with murdering a high school football star, two years after he was stabbed to death on an Oakland street corner.

programme.title: Lockup: Oakland Extended Stay: To PC or Not to PC
programme.desc: This California city is one of the birthplaces of West Coast hip hop and a hotbed for gangster rap. The lyrics often glorify criminal activity, so it should come as no surprise that many of the inmates at the jail consider themselves rap artists.

programme.title: Lockup: Orange County Jail Extended Stay: Wake Up Call
programme.desc: Inside Orange County Jail, confinement takes a dark turn for a light-hearted teenager, but provides a new beginning for an old bank robber. And a mother who has put drugs before her son gets another chance.

programme.title: Lockup: Orange County Jail Extended Stay: The Confession
programme.desc: A senior inmate takes up rap; a gang member poses a threat, and another inmate makes the most shocking confession ever heard on 'Lockup.'

programme.title: Lockup: Maricopa County Extended Stay: Daddy's Girl
programme.desc: It's a female housing unit with a reputation, one that inmates call 'a party' and a 'big sorority house' with a twist. But G Dorm at Maricopa County Jail in Phoenix, Arizona is about to turn one new inmate's life upside down.

programme.title: Lockup: Orange County Jail Extended Stay: Wake Up Call

programme.title: Lockup: Wichita Extended Stay: The Lifestyle
programme.desc: Kansas and surrounding Sedgwick County take pride in their Wild West roots. But Billy the Kid's gang would be seriously outgunned by the notorious gangs of modern day Wichita.

programme.title: Lockup: Wichita Extended Stay: Defending Bacon
programme.desc: At Wichita's Sedgwick County Jail an inmate launches an attack on another, sending him to the emergency room. Now a detective must get to the bottom of it, while a pastor hopes to get to the heart of it.

programme.title: Lockup: Sacramento Extended Stay: The Eyes Have It
programme.desc: Whether you're ready for it, or not life can get treacherous and fast. How do people react when a normal day takes a terrifying turn?

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Are Aliens Attacking Our Nuclear Arsenal?
programme.desc: Across the globe, senior military personnel witness UFOs above nuclear weapons bases and in some cases UFOs are reported to shut down nuclear missiles.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Paranormal Highway of America
programme.desc: A pattern of eye-witness reports of UFOs along the 37th parallel, the 3000 mile long line that runs through the heart of the U.S sends ex-Deputy Sheriff Chuck Zukowksi to investigate.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: The Yeti
programme.desc: New investigation of declassified Soviet files reveals evidence of an explanation for the grisly deaths of nine students who went missing in Siberia. Scientists examine clues that may prove the existence of a yeti.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Treasure of Outlaw Valley
programme.desc: Searching for a Gold Rush ghost town's legendary hidden treasure in the hills surrounding the town.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alaska's Fort Apocalypse
programme.desc: In Alaska, the ruins of a massive compound point to eerie evidence of an apocalyptic mystery. New discoveries reveal why this strange marvel was built in the snowy wilds of the Last Frontier and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting of Heartbreak Castle
programme.desc: Experts investigate what was once a fairy-tale castle, but now is abandoned, and rumored to be haunted. They uncover secrets of the ancient fortress, and its ghostly stories.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alien Hell Portal
programme.desc: A strange complex of tunnels on the grounds of a bizarre mansion was under lock-and-key for a century, and since its rediscovery, some believe its mysterious place is a gate to hell. New discoveries reveal its secret purpose and why it was abandoned.

programme.desc: In Alaska, the ruins of a massive compound point to eerie evidence of an apocalyptic mystery. New discoveries reveal why this strange marvel was built in the snowy wilds of the Last Frontier and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Treasure of Outlaw Valley

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Armageddon on the Nile
programme.desc: Cataclysmic changes in ancient Egypt might have been caused by an extraordinary set of international phenomena, and the latest tech helps identify the supernatural culprit. What experts discover reveals a truth stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Ramses' Forbidden City
programme.desc: Explorers in search of a lost city built by Ramses II uncover startling evidence that reveals the extent of ancient Egypt's scientific knowledge, and the new discoveries at this strange site offer more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Screaming Mummy
programme.desc: The Screaming Mummy is one of Egypt's greatest mysteries: a mummy with a terrifying expression frozen in agony. New discoveries reveal the connection between this horrific discovery and a pharaoh's murder, offering more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Tut's Curse: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal if King Tut's tomb is indeed cursed, as it is said to have killed nine people. The latest science might finally answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to investigate more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Unearthed: Inca Apocalypse: The Dark Evidence
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal secrets behind the fall of the Inca capital of Cusco.

programme.title: Unearthed: Dead Sea Scrolls: The Dark Truth
programme.desc: The Dead Sea Scrolls are one of the Holy Land's greatest mysteries, but new discoveries might finally reveal the hidden meaning behind the strange texts, and as experts get closer to unmasking their author, they find clues of an ancient apocalypse.

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Buried City
programme.desc: There's a lost city buried in the Sahara, and evidence reveals it's home to Nefertiti, Tutankhamun, and the forbidden god of an outlawed religion. Experts uncover the secret doomsday that caused this strange place to disappear.

programme.title: Unearthed: Vesuvius's Secret Victim
programme.desc: Scientists are using cutting edge technology to unearth a second city that, like the well-known city of Pompeii, was destroyed when Vesuvius erupted in 79 AD. This new town is revealed to be one of the most well-preserved Roman towns on earth.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of Troy
programme.desc: The legendary lost city at the center of the Trojan War is Troy, but its existence has never been confirmed. Now, discoveries and cutting-edge science might prove if this place existed, and if the Greeks really conquered it with the infamous Trojan Horse.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of the Stone Age
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal secrets and ritual of the people who build the world's largest stone circle.

programme.title: Unearthed: Forbidden City of the Pharaohs
programme.desc: A mysterious city in ancient Egypt is the home of the Valley of the Kings and grand temples, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and if the god the pharaohs worshiped here helped them rise to power.

programme.title: Unearthed: Tower of Babel: The New Evidence
programme.desc: The Tower of Babel is one of the most famous stories of the Bible, and to find out if it really existed, archaeologists use cutting-edge tech and the latest science to investigate how ancient engineers could have built such an extraordinary megastructure.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Special Delivery
programme.desc: A case that involves cocaine, morphine and a strange love triangle leads the Squad into the community for a street bust.

programme.desc: A man with everything going for him falls prey to drugs, leading him to crime.

programme.title: Why I Ran: Robert/ Montrell

programme.title: Why I Ran: Kevin/ Jason

programme.desc: When a friendly neighbor marries barely legal Linda, he rescues her from abject poverty, and invites her sister, Patti, into their twisted relationship.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Girl in the Photo
programme.desc: After a teenage house party spirals out of control, a shocking photo goes viral around the local schools. A vicious campaign of cyber bullying ensues that drives an innocent girl to take desperate action.

programme.title: Web of Lies: California Scheming
programme.desc: After meeting the woman of his dreams online, radio DJ Alan Lee Lama moves over a thousand miles to be with her. When her best friend gets involved, he gets caught up in a bizarre love triangle.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Crime Scene Selfie
programme.desc: 23-year-old Amanda Taylor shares her entire life on the internet. Following a terrible tragedy, her posts begin take a dark turn.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Love Goes South
programme.desc: Lonely musician Ray Merrill thinks he's found his dream woman in Brazil through an online dating website. But as the exotic romance heats up, money starts to go missing.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: When the sexy and beautiful Charlene is around, sparks fly. But the sparks aren't limited to one man. One after another, Josh, Jace, Tim and Casey all go crazy vying for her love. And while love is a many splendored thing, it can also have a body count.

programme.title: Young, Hot, and Deadly: Pamela Smart Part 2
programme.desc: Police discover the scandalous affair between the killer, 15-year old Billy Flynn, and Pamela Smart. She is arrested for masterminding the murder and her trial turns into a worldwide sensation.

programme.title: Young, Hot, and Deadly: Pamela Smart Part 3
programme.desc: Audio recordings send shock waves through the courtroom and Pamela Smart takes the stand to claim Billy acted alone.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Out in the Sticks
programme.desc: After Heather Young and her boyfriend relocate to Michigan's tranquil Lower Peninsula, a nasty fight leads to an explosive and terrifying outcome.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Welcome to the Devil House
programme.desc: A mansion deep in the Georgia woods is said to house terrible secrets. Everyone in this rural county has heard the rumors, but no one knows the truth ... until a 1982 visit to Corpsewood Manor by a group of young locals turns deadly.

programme.title: The Family I Had
programme.desc: What begins as a seemingly isolated incident of a 13-year-old boy killing his three-year-old sister slowly dissolves into the illuminating the anatomy of a broken family.

programme.title: Dateline: Deadly Liasons
programme.desc: She was a small town girl from rural Wisconsin. He was a Chicago superstar, a hometown hero with the legendary Bears. Together, they were expecting their first child. But no one was expecting their tale to end in the deadly way it did.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: On Her Own
programme.desc: Native Swede, Marioara Shand, is setting out on her own in Taos, New Mexico, after a recent breakup. One day in July of 2002, police discover her body in a brutal, bloody scene inside her new home.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: Stuck in the Middle
programme.desc: When Paula Cardwell returns from running errands, she finds her 20-year-old daughter, Anna Catherine, lying dead on the kitchen floor. The small town of Wetumpka, Alabama, is left stunned and determined to find the devil in their midst.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: Red Mustang
programme.desc: When 22-year-old LeAnne Martinez fails to pick up her daughter from her mother's house, her family worries. Her red Mustang is missing, and what they find inside her home will leave them forever scarred.

programme.title: Home Alone: Bullets in the Basement
programme.desc: Single mom Erin installs a security system when she realizes that someone's been inside her home. But that doesn't stop the intruder from breaking in, determined to end her life as well as his own.

programme.title: Home Alone: The Doorbell Rang Twice
programme.desc: Newlyweds Kristi and Jim Newman have their Christian beliefs tested to the limit when they come face to face with three masked men in their home. The intruders aren't just here to rob them, they're here to break their souls.

programme.title: Home Alone: A Mother and a Maniac
programme.desc: On the night of May 10, 2017, Haley McHam decides to leave her abusive partner Jamie. But when Jamie shows up the next day, nobody could have predicted the tragic home invasion that will leave Haley pleading for her life.

programme.title: Home Alone: First Flame
programme.desc: Sophia Putney-Wilcox is excited to start her senior year of high school after ending her abusive relationship with her boyfriend Adam. Unable to take the rejection, Adam breaks into her house with a bottle of gasoline and a lighter.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Stalin: Russia's Steel Tyrant
programme.desc: For 30 years, Joseph Stalin rules the Soviet Union with an iron fist. Anyone who stands in his way will be destroyed.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mao: China's Chairman of Death
programme.desc: Mao Zedong, Supreme Leader of Communist China for 30 years, is one of the 20th Century's most ruthless tyrants. His reign of cruelty and revenge, transforms him to a position of authority so great, his personality cult remains to this day.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape From the Rock
programme.desc: In 1987, an ex-con prepares for his most daring crime yet; ambushing a prison transport van.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Send a Bomb in the Mail
programme.desc: Albert Paul is Maine's most notorious escape artist who's drawn to a life of crime. Shortly after making parole, he's arrested for murder and spends the next couple of decades pulling off daring prison breaks only to get captured after every attempt.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Go to Canada
programme.desc: Scott Freeburg has been in and out of prison his whole life. So when a drug deal goes wrong, he runs to Canada. But soon Scott is back in the gang life. And the Canadian police quickly ID him by his tattoos and extradite him back to the U.S.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got the Wrong Four People Killed
programme.desc: Scott Burnside hires a hit man to kill a friend's wife. But when the hit goes wrong, and four people are found murdered, Burnside flees to a remote island. On the run, Scott is unable to adjust to his lonely life. His family ties tip the Feds.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Bad Temper

programme.desc: Mao Zedong, Supreme Leader of Communist China for 30 years, is one of the 20th Century's most ruthless tyrants. His reign of cruelty and revenge, transforms him to a position of authority so great, his personality cult remains to this day.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Close Quarter Battle
programme.desc: Explore the chosen weapons when engaging the enemy at short range. The decision could mean the difference between life and death.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Firepower
programme.desc: Take a look at some of the world's most powerful man-portable weapons. Psychological impact and the power to intimidate, firepower systems have the military capability to unleash tremendous force on the enemy.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Robotic Warriors
programme.desc: Robotic Warriors are futuristic unmanned war machines that can even think for themselves. These intelligent weapon systems combine stealth and autonomy with the power to strike and destroy their targets.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Bloody George at the Chosin Reservoir
programme.desc: The untold true story of 'Bloody George,' an under strength, undermanned, marine rifle company, hastily called to serve their country in 1950 at the start of the Korean War. Their courage would be legendary, their fight, epic.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Chosin: One Way Out
programme.desc: Trapped and outnumbered seven to one early in the Korean War, US Marines must fight their way out or die.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Fallujah: The Taking of Terror Central
programme.desc: Operation Phantom Fury was meant to be a 48 hour battle but insurgents, armed with IEDs and a stockpile of grenades, fought back. US forces faced one of the toughest urban conflicts since Vietnam as they tried to reclaim the city.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege
programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Looking Out for Lava Tubes in Kona
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler are on the hunt to find an empty lot with great ocean views. They want to build a spec home on the property that they can turn around and sell in the coming year.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Skylight to the Stars and a Stunning Free-Form Lanai
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler build a brand new house in an upcountry area of the Big Island. Skylights are placed throughout the home, including a giant one in the master bedroom that will allow the homeowners to sleep under the stars.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: A Pool With An Ocean View
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler fly to Maui to get inspiration for renovating a vacation rental property back on the Big Island.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Ocean View Open House
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler are ready to sell the first house they ever built in Hawaii, but the Ocean View house needs some freshening up first, including replacing a rotted-out back lanai.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Lava Stamp of Approval
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler create a custom lava-stamp driveway and front lanai that add major curb appeal to a spec home in the Palisades area of Kona.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Refreshing Pool Renovation
programme.desc: The Dickinsons revitalize an algae-filled pool. Diandra finds the perfect glass tile to replace the outdated ceramic waterline tiles, while Tyler fixes the cracked pool deck and builds a stained Douglas fir fence around it.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Fripp Island Fix-Up
programme.desc: Jim and Sarah are looking for a diamond in the rough on the hidden gem of Fripp Island, North Carolina. They find a property with an unparalleled oceanfront overlook.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Living Through Renovations on North Padre Island, Texas
programme.desc: Fallon and Mark Jennings are Texas natives with a big Texas family, and they're on the hunt for the perfect waterside home on North Padre Island.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Beachfront or Bust in Myrtle Beach
programme.desc: Brad grew up spending summers in North Myrtle Beach, South Carolina. Now he's ready to find a vacation home for his family, and local broker Jason Moore is just the man to help them find it, along with some help from his wife and kids.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Suburban House: Part 1
programme.desc: Mike and Michael Jr. take things to the next level as they decide to go into business together. They purchase an outdated, suburban property and face a wonky layout, too many stairs and open-concept headaches.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Suburban House: Part 2
programme.desc: Mike and Michael figure out the open-concept dilemma at the Suburban House and turn their attention outside, where their plans for a spacious new deck come up short. They must quickly find a solution before the fast-approaching open house arrives.

programme.desc: Brad grew up spending summers in North Myrtle Beach, South Carolina. Now he's ready to find a vacation home for his family, and local broker Jason Moore is just the man to help them find it, along with some help from his wife and kids.

programme.desc: Sophie's soggy, sloping yard needs help, so she pleads for Matt Blashaw to come home with her. He designs a usable space for grilling, dining and lounging, all with an English garden vibe.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Heart of the Home
programme.desc: Tamara Day tackles the battered kitchen of her new property, an 1897 bungalow. She enlarges and modernizes the space while preserving traditional elements of a bungalow kitchen.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: How Suite It Is
programme.desc: Tamara Day transforms a bedroom as she continues renovating an 1897 bungalow. Knowing modern buyers expect a master suite, Tamara annexes a second room to enlarge the tiny closet and add a bathroom.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: From Studs to Spindles
programme.desc: Tamara Day steps in to finish the renovation of a 1890s Craftsman-style home. This home was previously ripped down to the studs by a contractor before it was abandoned.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Book Lamps and Bubble Glass
programme.desc: Renovations on the 1890s Craftsman-style home continues as Tamara enlarges the master bedroom and creates a beautiful study. She runs into trouble when the antique tiles for the bathroom floor are not salvageable. Tamara finds a way to re-use old glass.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Double Dutch Dilemma
programme.desc: Tamara gets the opportunity to renovate a French chateau she's wanted to tackle for years. She finds that a recent renovation left the kitchen looking outdated and tacky, but she's determined to create a home full of authentic details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Trouble With Cobbles
programme.desc: Tamara continues work on a French chateau as she overhauls a large master suite covered in the tackiest wallpaper she's ever ripped out. She plans to move a bathroom to create an additional bedroom and extend a hallway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All Bricked Out
programme.desc: Tamara takes an 1892 brick Craftsman that was converted into three apartments and tries to restore it back into a single-family dwelling while keeping original details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Swing of Things
programme.desc: Tamara continues working on an 1892 Craftsman and struggles to add a master bathroom. Then, she finds a way to repurpose floor boards into a porch swing, but her plan to reuse a clawfoot tub hits a snag because of a narrow doorway.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Island Getaway
programme.desc: A family attempts to build a 400-square foot cabin situated on a small island in Northern Idaho. Access to the property is limited and rough waters make it difficult to bring materials in. It's a race to the finish as winter hits the island early.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Ohio Valley Hut
programme.desc: Two brothers build a high-end, off-grid vacation home on their Ohio family's cattle ranch.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Mountain Timber Frame
programme.desc: A man builds an off-grid timber frame cabin on his family's 100-acre property in upstate New York.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Yurts So Good
programme.desc: Follow a young couple as they prep their own land and break ground to build their ultimate luxury yurt in the woods of Montana.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Mushroom House
programme.desc: Sage Stoneman teams up with world-renowned natural builder SunRay Kelley to experiment with a never-before-used building material: mushrooms! Follow along as they not only design a mushroom-shaped house, but virtually grow one.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Cupcake Champions: Glee
programme.desc: Our bakers will have to be in perfect pitch if they want to win the chance to serve their champion cupcakes at a cast and crew party for one of the most popular shows on TV, Fox's 'Glee.'

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Aloha Cupcakes

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Cupcake Champions: Grand Finale

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship: A Perfect Spring Day

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Family Recipes

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Game Day Munchies
programme.desc: Host Alfonso Ribeiro serves up a fantasy league of snacks. Clear off the coffee table for Home Run Inn's Meat Lovers Pizza and the cheese and caramel popcorn mix from Garrett's in Chicago.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Secret Center
programme.desc: Join host Alfonso Ribeiro as he explores foods with secret centers. From the gooey middle of the Mallo Cup to the creamy goodness of a peppermint cream or the surprisingly complex filling in a Mini Beef Wellington.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Go Nuts
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro and Unwrapped 2.0 go nuts for nuts! Tumbled in sugar, nestled in chocolate, whatever you do with nuts, it's hard to go wrong. Find out how one candy bar did active military duty in WW1.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Candy Critters
programme.desc: Gophers and bunnies and butterflies oh my! Even a vegetarian will want to snack on these creatures. Catch cheerful Albanese gummy butterflies in action and pop in on Savannah Candy Kitchen's chocolate gophers.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Cheese Glorious Cheese
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro proves that no matter how you slice it, cheese just makes everything better. Find out how TGI Fridays' cheddar bacon potato skin appetizer gets turned into a yummy chip and how Mom Made Cheesy Mac tastes.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Pork

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Street Eats

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fire Trucks

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fired-Up Chefs

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Cowboy Cooking
programme.desc: Chicken fried steak over an open fire and peach cobbler in a cast iron skillet.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Texas 'Cue-Step in Georgia

programme.desc: The Pugs make a hospitalized child's wish come true; The Pugs search for Bob's Gift.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: How ARF Got His Bark Back / Sir Bob
programme.desc: When Bob can't fix ARF's voice box, Bingo and Rolly race to find an inventor. Bob's favorite knight goes missing at a jousting event, plunging the Pugs on a mission to find him!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Fearful Flier/ Lend Me Your Paw
programme.desc: Bodhi faces his fear to earn his final stamp towards becoming a Super Flier. After Mia gets a thorn stuck in her paw, she worries it will hurt when K.C. tries to take it out.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Night Flight/ Slippery When Wet
programme.desc: Freddy must face his fear of the dark when he and Pip are assigned a nighttime delivery. Pip hopes to speed through the next delivery, but they are tasked to deliver a baby sloth.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Tagalong Polliwog/ Sparkly Star Switcheroo
programme.desc: Kermit's nephew, Robin, comes to visit and everyone is excited to play with him, but Kermit is very protective. When Rizzo is sad about not making a wish on a shooting star, Summer paints a sparkly star to cheer him up.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: No Laughing Matter/ Puppy for a Day
programme.desc: Fozzie loses his Great Uncle Schnozzie's Jokebook and is convinced he can't be funny without it. The Muppets try to convince Miss Nanny that they're ready for a puppy.

programme.title: Bluey: Wagon Ride / Taxi / The Beach

programme.title: Vampirina: The Hauntley Girls/ The Not So Haunted House
programme.desc: A magical book that wreaks havoc is accidentally selected as Vee's first book club read. The girls come up with a haunted plan to keep people from wanting to buy Poppy's house.

programme.title: Vampirina: Baby Dragon / Gloommates
programme.desc: A baby dragon visits the Hauntleys and takes a special liking to Gregoria. When the Hauntley house becomes infested with Charmer bugs, Edna insists the entire family stay with her while the house is being fumigated.

programme.title: Movie: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: A bumbling panda's dreams of being a warrior may come true when a villain comes to town.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Good Luck Mr. Whiskers/ Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: Theodore is convinced that Miss Croner's missing cat is the cause of a terrible curse. When Dave comes down with a bad cold, Alvin quickly offers to take over Dad duty.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Girls Night Out/ Tables Turned
programme.desc: Dave discovers he's not too good at roughing it outdoors when he goes on a day hike with the Chipettes. When Alvin pranks Simon with a trick website making it look like Alvin is smarter, the chipettes prank Alvin back.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Best in Shoe/ Royal Pain
programme.desc: To land the lead role in a play, Alvin wagers Brittany that he can remain in character as a shoe cobbler. When Brittany becomes convinced she's a long lost princess she carries her new royal status a little too far.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Who's Your Daddy/ Homewrecker
programme.desc: Dad can't attend a Squirrelly Scout Festival; Vicky frames Timmy for destroying his house.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: A New Squid in Town/ Wish Fixers
programme.desc: Mark Chang has to be protected from a forced wedding; Timmy's on a bad wishmaking streak.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Truth or Cosmoquences/ Beach Bummed
programme.desc: Cosmo wants help impressing people at his reunion; Timmy wishes he were stronger.

programme.title: Movie: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: A bumbling panda's dreams of being a warrior may come true when a villain comes to town.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Keep Your Eyes on the Panda!
programme.desc: A family with a hockey-playing daughter and twin sons faces intense games like assembling a wobbly giant panda puzzle in a quest to take home the $25,000 grand prize.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: New Digs/ Krabs a la Mode
programme.desc: SpongeBob moves into the Krusty Krab and turns it into an ice skating rink.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob vs. the Patty Gadget/ Money Talks
programme.desc: SpongeBob competes against a patty-making machine; Mr. Krabs' money tells him to spend it.

programme.title: It's Pony: Gerry's Birthday/ Haircut

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Blackened Sponge/ Mermaidman vs. Spongebob
programme.desc: SpongeBob punches himself in the face, but tells everyone that he fought off a thug.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: 20,000 Patties Under the Sea/ The Battle of Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs turn an old submarine into a mobile Krusty Krab. When Patrick and SpongeBob discover they have clashing views on cleanliness, their disagreement blows up into an epic battle.

programme.desc: Pat joins SpongeBob at boating school; Mr. Krabs takes Bob and Squid fishing.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Weenies Allowed/ Squilliam Returns
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to get into the Salty Spitoon; Squidward's old rival comes to town.

programme.title: Movie: Campfire Kiss
programme.desc: A mother takes her son camping to reconnect and butts heads with her cabin neighbour who is seeking a connection with his daughter.

programme.title: Movie: Love in Paradise
programme.desc: A Western movie star is forced to spend a weekend doing PR at a dude ranch. When his fans learn he's terrified of horses, he sets out to prove to them that he really does have what it takes to be a rancher.

programme.title: Movie: Dater's Handbook
programme.desc: A woman changes her personality according to a dating guide book to find a husband, but realizes the man she wants is the one who loves her for who she is.

programme.title: Movie: Love on Ice
programme.desc: A former figure skater gets an improbably shot to reclaim skating glory when a young coach sees greatness in her. They find their love of skating goes far beyond the ice.

programme.title: Movie: Royally Ever After
programme.desc: Following a proposal, a man reveals he is the prince of a small country called St. Ives, and he needs his disapproving parents' blessing in order to marry.

programme.title: Movie: Autumn Dreams
programme.desc: A young couple's spur of the moment marriage is immediately annulled by the bride's parents. Years later, they discover that a glitch in the paperwork means they are still husband and wife.

programme.title: Movie: Love in Store
programme.desc: Two rival home shopping hosts are forced together while competing for a promotion. Along the way they find their on-air chemistry kindles an off-air spark.

programme.title: Movie: Wedding Bells
programme.desc: Two commitment-phobic busy professionals with little in common are asked to stand up in their mutual friend’s wedding. They didn't expect a life-changing romantic experience of their own.

programme.title: Movie: Forgetting Sarah Marshall
programme.desc: After a musician is dumped by his actress girlfriend, he travels to Hawaii to heal. When he arrives in Hawaii, he discovers that his ex and her new boyfriend are staying at the same resort.

programme.title: Movie: The Wedding Singer
programme.desc: After being stood up at the altar, Robby's entire world is turned upside down. Performing for wedding receptions and bar mitzvahs only serves as a constant reminder of his unhappiness, until he meets and falls in love with a waitress named Julia.

programme.title: Movie: Super Troopers
programme.desc: State troopers must stick together when budget cuts threaten to shut down their unit.

programme.title: South Park: Do the Handicapped Go to Hell?

programme.title: South Park: Proper Condom Use

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Potion
programme.desc: When a woman comes down with flu-like symptoms and eventually dies, a neurologist suspects she was poisoned with radioactive thallium. The FBI suspects her neighbour, who had a very extensive background in chemistry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Blood Trail
programme.desc: In a quiet village in Great Britain, a farmer came upon a chilling sight. Impaled on his fence post was a severed lamb’s head along with a note which read, 'You next.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: Accident or Murder?
programme.desc: Police believed that a husband murdered his wife after they learn that he had taken out a life insurance policy on her shortly before she died. When an investigator recreates the fall, the results are surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Core Evidence
programme.desc: When a 16-month-old baby dies, tests discover e. coli in her system. Eventually the bacteria are traced back to a fruit juice manufacturer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: On the Rocks
programme.desc: The naked body of a young woman is discovered in a remote area leading forensic investigators on a search for clues to her identity and the identity of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: A fire leads investigators to re-examine an unusual death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A young doctor in a rural community is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting two of his female patients. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the women continue to insist that he sedated and raped them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil
programme.desc: In 1993, two Texas teenagers, a 14-year-old boy and his 13-year-old stepsister, were brutally murdered. It took forensic evidence and a behavioral profile to identify their killer as Jason Massey, who had a history of torturing animals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Legionnaires' Disease
programme.desc: History was made in Philadelphia in the summer of 1976 -- not because of the bicentennial, but because of the mysterious death of 34 Legionnaires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Wilson Murder
programme.desc: An eye doctor is found beaten to death, by his wife. When police arrest an itinerant painter for the murder, he accuses the wife and her sister of hiring him to kill the doctor. Investigators must use forensic science to work out just what happen.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Trace
programme.desc: The deaths of a child and a truck driver in the same hospital on the same day are investigated to see if there is a link between them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Knot for Everyone
programme.desc: In the mid-1980s, bodies of nude woman were found in remote hills of California. The police got a break when a known prostitute escaped an attacker and was able to identify him and his automobile. The suspect was 50-year-old Roger Kibbe.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Plummer's Gold
programme.desc: Josh sets off for gold rush country to search for the lost fortune of a notorious Montana sheriff. During his investigation, Josh explores hidden cave systems and blows open a mine that's been sealed for over a century.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mysteries of the Dead Sea Scrolls
programme.desc: Josh Gates travels to the Holy Land to dig in with an archaeologist who has recently discovered new Dead Sea Scrolls. Josh also sees cutting-edge technology restore scroll fragments in a way that could change how we read the Bible.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Treasure of the Copper Scroll
programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates a unique Dead Sea Scroll etched with riddles that could lead to an ancient treasure. Following new leads, Josh treks into the punishing Jordanian desert in search of the potential fortune.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Ancestors and Air Travel
programme.desc: Josh Gates travels all around the world digging up information on two mysteries: the origins of humanity and the elusive Northwest Flight 2501.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: India's Atlantis
programme.desc: Josh Gates travels to India in search of Dwarka, a mythical kingdom swallowed by the ocean. To find evidence that the golden city is real, Josh dives into the Arabian Sea and visits a dig site that could rewrite history.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Ancestors and Air Travel
programme.desc: Josh Gates travels all around the world digging up information on two mysteries: the origins of humanity and the elusive Northwest Flight 2501.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Columbus: Legend or Liar?
programme.desc: Josh travels worldwide to uncover the myths behind Christopher Columbus.

programme.desc: When a Boomer, Millennial, and Gen Xer find themselves face to face with three grizzly bears in a never-before-attempted competition of speed, strength, and strategy, one human finds out the hard way what it means to have skin in the game.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Angels or Demons?
programme.desc: Josh Gates shines a light on places darkened by the past, from a mysterious mansion connected to a haunted heiress in California to a colorful festival commemorating the death of a demoness in India.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors: My Favorite Fishing Partner
programme.desc: Jimmy and Chris fish in Alabama.

programme.title: Seasons on the Fly: Belize - Permit Alley

programme.desc: Veteran Shaun Brewers shares his story of PTSD and his bond with his service dog Gunnar.

programme.title: The Fish Guyz: Patching it Together

programme.title: George Poveromo's World of Saltwater Fishing: Palm Beach, Florida - Kite Fishing!
programme.desc: Kite fishing, a popular tactic for catching sailfish, king mackerel, tuna, dolphin and wahoo during winter and spring off Southern Florida, is showcased.

programme.title: Silver Kings: Joseph Borski
programme.desc: Teenagers Joseph Borski is fishing with Jared in Islamorada.

programme.title: Sportfishing Adventures: Key West Snappers with a Side of Country
programme.desc: Chris Trosset and country artist Brandon Lay join Rick to fish the Key West reefs and wrecks for snappers.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Rally in the Valley
programme.desc: Rick hits a gold layer that may save his season. Parker's crew takes big risks in Death Valley. Tony turns a corner. Dave Turin is forced to troubleshoot when thick clay in the paydirt clogs the sluice. The top lieutenants take over the Dirt.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Rocky Mountain Gold
programme.desc: Dave Turin and his crew kick off an epic new mining season in the historic hills of Montana. After a freak accident nearly derails their expedition from the start, they rally and find the first big gold of the season.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Big Bowl Bet
programme.desc: After a great start, thick clay in the pay dirt clogs the sluice, forcing Dave Turin and his crew to quickly troubleshoot the land and get the operation back on the gold.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Trouble in Paradise
programme.desc: Torrential downpours and brutal wind storms push starving survivalists Riley and Kyle to their breaking points in the Honduran jungle.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Blindsided
programme.desc: A dangerous burn and clashing survival strategies plague survivalists Angela and Steven in the jungles of Panama.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Meltdown on the Mountain
programme.desc: In a high-altitude jungle in Colombia, Tommy and Leah face territorial Pumas and venomous fer-de-lance snakes. Their biggest threat is the extreme temperature changes, with highs near 100 and lows in the 40s.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Stalked on the Savannah
programme.desc: In a punishing Brazilian savannah, survivalists Wes and Jesse deal with searing heat as well as paralyzing wasps, aggressive bees, and poisonous rattlesnakes. Starvation forces Jesse to attack a beehive in search of honey and the entire colony retaliates.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: You're Sexy and You Know It
programme.desc: Bride Aimee says she wants a dress that's tight, blingy and, to use her words, 'a little slutty'. Yovanna and her two friends have flown in to find her a dress that shows off the figure she's so proud of. Sahar, a belly dancing paralegal, has her fitting.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Worth the Weight
programme.desc: Kristy lost 100 pounds and is looking for the right dress to show off her new figure. Kristin lost 40 pounds and is excited to fit into dress samples.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: What's My Style
programme.desc: Lela doesn't know what she wants and Christiane gets nervous about finding something.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Big Budget Brides
programme.desc: Monisha has come looking for a dress for her three wedding ceremonies. Mary has a budget of thirty thousand dollars to buy two dresses.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Extreme Entourage

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: 2 Dresses, 1 Dream
programme.desc: Jacqueline wastes no time explaining that she would like two different style dresses for her wedding.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: The Client Is Randy Fenoli!
programme.desc: Randy surprises his next bride who isn't yet ready to commit to a dress.

programme.desc: With two weeks until the big I Do's, our next bride is still in the dark but not for long. Randy swaps coasts to give a military veteran the surprise of her life.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: The WAG
programme.desc: Bride Lyndzie believes she was royalty in a past life and this WAG intends to have a royal wedding in this life. Bride Ashley wants a dress that's not too revealing so her mom won't have a heart attack.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Bedazzled Truck Driver
programme.desc: Feisty Rebecca has lost 90 pounds and won't let her mom keep her from her dream dress. Plus-size Cassidy has her heart set on one particular Hayley Paige gown. Plus, a glam wedding proves you're never too old to be a princess.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: Next Time I See You Will Be in New York!

programme.desc: Feisty Rebecca has lost 90 pounds and won't let her mom keep her from her dream dress. Plus-size Cassidy has her heart set on one particular Hayley Paige gown. Plus, a glam wedding proves you're never too old to be a princess.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: For His Consideration
programme.desc: Fashionista Britanny shops with her beloved uncle, who insists her dress has lots of sparkle. Nicole is an excited daddy's girl whose dad is just as delighted and desperate to please. Andrea wants a fancy lace gown for her manor wedding in Michigan.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Til Dress Do Us Part
programme.desc: After losing 100 pounds, Stephanie wants to show off her new curves in a sexy wedding dress. Christine is looking for a traditional white gown to wear for her vow renewal ceremony. In for her fitting, Akisha is worried her dress won't impress her fiancé.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: My Day, Mom's Way
programme.desc: Pageant queen Anastagia wants to choose her own dress for once, but she needs to battle her mother's strong influence first. Christalyne must broaden her colour pallet to please traditional Indian in-laws. Lisa butts heads with her mom over an ivory gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: More, More, More!
programme.desc: Rasha needs a huge ball gown that will wow all 700 guests at her wedding. Melissa's dad has a special surprise for her when she wants more bling. Burcu needs a personal touch from Pnina when she finds her dress to be lacking in sparkle.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: New Dress -- New Beginning
programme.desc: Comedian Seth Meyers surprises an injured army vet. Southern model Ashley wants a sexy dress that also impresses her picky father. Dana returns for a fitting before her wedding with her college sweetheart at their alma mater.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Always the Pageant Girl...
programme.desc: Ashley, former Miss New Jersey, is desperate for a dress that puts her pageant days behind her. Rodeo queen Becky wants a gown with bling. Having tried over 100 dresses, Melissa desires something to stand out from the crowd.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Not Hell Nor High Water
programme.desc: Randy is in Louisiana to save bride Kelli's big day after she lost everything in a devastating flood. Social media star Claudia Oshrey, aka Girl With No Job, brings sass to her appointment. Pnina Tornai feels the heat during Bridal Fashion Week.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: We Don't Do Anything Normal
programme.desc: Bodybuilder Melissa's dress vision is simple: it must show off her muscles. Shay may lose his cool with Randy as they help Kat, a bride with a tight budget. Jasmine wants a unique bridal look to match her one-of-a-kind wedding on top of the Grand Canyon.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: My Sisters are Picking Out My Dress!

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: This Is My Fiancé...and This Is His Wife!
programme.desc: Bride Jennifer arrives at Kleinfeld with her fiancé - and his wife. Glori only wants the trendiest of gowns straight off the latest runway. Amanda needs to leave with a dress today for her wedding inside a chapel made of ice.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Empire State of Bride
programme.desc: The entire Kleinfeld team comes together as a family to help Emily, who needs a dress for her 10-year vow renewal atop the Empire State Building in just two days. Olympian Queen Harrison faces new hurdles while deciding on her dream wedding gown.

programme.title: Young Dylan: Imaginary Friends
programme.desc: Young Dylan arrives at his relatives' home needing a place to live, but his streetwise swagger upends the conservative Wilson household.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Gary's Got Legs/ King Plankton

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Drive Happy/ Old Man Patrick

programme.title: Tornado Alley: I Survived: Trapped by a Tornado

programme.title: Mayday: Flight 574: Lost

programme.title: Mayday: Southern Storm
programme.desc: The crew of Southern Airways Flight 242 find themselves in a violent storm. When rain and hail start pelting the aircraft; the windshield shatters and both engines give out, the pilot has no option but to try and land on a highway in Georgia.

programme.title: Mayday: Pilot Betrayed
programme.desc: Scandinavian Airlines Flight 751 takes off in winter conditions from Stockholm and within seconds, both engines fail. Investigators must determine what brought down a nearly new, state-of-the-art jetliner.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Road to Recovery
programme.desc: Mitch, Merv and James pull together to save the load of a tractor trailer clinging to the edge of a mountain. Jamie Davis brings home a surprise for the team.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: Not the Best Spot To Be
programme.desc: The Ross crew deals with a pileup on the 401. Sonny helps a drive stuck in a dangerous stretch of highway. Zach masters a difficult move for the first time.

programme.title: Tornado Road: The Pressure
programme.desc: Teams of storm chasers take viewers into the path of Mother Nature's fury, following a tornado on its path of destruction, in the hopes of dissecting the power and force behind these storms.

programme.title: Tornado Road: Love and Hate
programme.desc: Teams of storm chasers take viewers into the path of Mother Nature's fury, following a tornado on its path of destruction, in the hopes of dissecting the power and force behind these storms.

programme.desc: Teams of storm chasers take viewers into the path of Mother Nature's fury, following a tornado on its path of destruction, in the hopes of dissecting the power and force behind these storms.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: Super Fantastic Weather
programme.desc: When it comes to Mother Nature, you never know what she’s going to dish out.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: When Good Weather Goes Bad

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: Weather 911
programme.desc: It can take just minutes for an extraordinary scene to turn to chaos after weather strikes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Party Crasher

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: Find out which joker has pet parakeets, why the crew had to work in a truck down the block while filming at a bagel shop and who got to sound the start horn for Murr's race across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: Find out which joker always brings a bag of dental hygiene products to set, why Q changed into cargo pants in a store window and where the art department found the turquoise ring.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dropping Knowledge

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Field of Screams
programme.desc: How the creepy voice changer was made for Devil Voices. The penguin tips Murr learned as a zookeeper.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hump Day

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Left Field

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Bogey Man

programme.desc: Andy and April decide to throw a Halloween party at their house, which upsets Ben.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: End of the World

programme.desc: Leslie enlists the help of her friends to host a model U.N. at Pawnee Central High School. Chris asks Ann for advice about love when his date cancels on him.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Smallest Park
programme.desc: Leslie uses her new tourist attraction as a way to spend more time with Ben. Ron and April encourage Andy to go to college.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: The Trial of Leslie Knope
programme.desc: When things come to a head for Leslie, she must defend her actions.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Citizen Knope
programme.desc: Leslie forms a citizen action group to achieve changes outside of the Parks Department. Meanwhile, everyone in the office brainstorms to get ideas for Leslie's Christmas gift.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: The Comeback Kid
programme.desc: Leslie enlists everyone's help in staging an attention-getting event. Ben explores a new hobby.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Campaign Ad
programme.desc: Faced with a tough new opponent, Leslie and Ben disagree on the content of her first campaign ad. Ron is very uncomfortable when Chris tries to befriend him, while Andy and April make a trip to the doctor.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Bowling for Votes
programme.desc: Leslie and Ben decide to hold a casual bowling party after hearing from a focus group.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Operation Ann
programme.desc: On Valentine's Day, Leslie decides she needs to find Ann a new man. Ben must enlist Ron's help when he is stumped by Leslie's elaborate Valentine's Day scavenger hunt.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Dave Returns
programme.desc: While trying to get an endorsement from the chief of police, Leslie and Ben run into Leslie's old flame, Dave.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Sweet Sixteen
programme.desc: Leslie realizes the department has forgotten Jerry's birthday and decides to throw him a party.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Campaign Shake-Up
programme.desc: Leslie and Ben are caught off guard when her opponent, Bobby Newport, hires a powerful campaign manager from Washington.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Lucky
programme.desc: Leslie and Ben are thrilled when an Indianapolis talk show wants to interview Leslie.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Live Ammo
programme.desc: Leslie finds out the parks departments budget is about to be cut and tries to convince the councilman to make the cuts elsewhere which causes unexpected problems for her campaign.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: The Debate
programme.desc: Leslie goes toe to toe with Bobby Newport in their big televised debate. Ann, Tom and Chris work in the media spin room, while Ron goes the extra mile to save a party for Leslie's donors.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Bus Tour
programme.desc: When Leslie goes on a bus tour for the final day of her campaign, she is caught off guard when an important person in Pawnee passes away. Meanwhile, Andy susses out a security threat and Chris finds an unlikely cure for his depression.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Win, Lose or Draw
programme.desc: Bobby Newport and Leslie are separated by a razor thin margin on Election Day. While everyone waits with Leslie for the race to be called, they ponder their futures and potential opportunities.

programme.title: Movie: 17 Again

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Revisited: An Owner Who Tries to Do It All

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Cajun Seafood Crisis
programme.desc: The Balcony in Larose, La., is one of the oldest Cajun seafood restaurants in the bayou. The owner has worked there for 28 years, but her friendly relationship with the employees has cost her their respect.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Indulgent Dishes

programme.title: North Woods Law: Bait and Switch
programme.desc: McKee and Pushee confront two hunters lying about illegally baiting deer, Officer Arsenault deals with a tight-lipped teenage fisherman who refuses to provide any information and Lt. Boudreau stumbles upon a couple in a compromising position.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Cold Case
programme.desc: Officers Bronson and Lucas help state police investigate a 19-year-old missing person case. A landowner requests help with a group of squatters on an island in the Connecticut River. And, Officer Towne comes to the aid of an injured hawk.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Hit and Run
programme.desc: Lieutenant Boudreau and trainee Crouse investigate a man who shot someone while hunting illegally. Sergeant Lucas responds to a porcupine wreaking havoc. Later, when a seriously ill hiker is trapped on Mount Garfield, Officer Holmes races to the scene.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Rules of the Game
programme.desc: Officer Canfield responds to a call about an orphaned bear cub. Sgt. Lucas pays an unexpected visit to a hunter suspected of illegal baiting. And Officer Cyrs investigates a large buck shot by a young, nervous hunter during muzzleloader season.

programme.title: North Woods Law: No Trespassing
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett investigate a possible illegal turkey kill site, while Officer Bronson responds to a call about a snake in a bed. Officer Demler confronts a suspect about shooting a turkey on private property.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Circle of Life
programme.desc: Officer Crouse responds to a call about a nuisance raccoon, while Officer Towne searches for a deer attacked by coyotes. Officer Hannett monitors a suspicious fisherman and Officer St. Pierre responds to a call about an impaired driver.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Don't Feed the Bears
programme.desc: Officer Joe Canfield investigates a home with multiple bear feeding complaints and finds more than he bargained for. Officer Egan investigates an abandoned car and missing persons case. And Officers respond to a drowning in the Connecticut River.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Last Days of Winter

programme.title: Counting Cars: Searching for Soul

programme.title: Counting Cars: Boiling Point
programme.desc: Danny and Kevin find themselves in hot water when a motorcycle pullover goes south. Later, a woman brings in her recovered IROC-Z and leaves with a genius thief-busting solution.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Really Sweet 16

programme.title: Counting Cars: You Talkin' to Me?

programme.title: Counting Cars: Drive: The Horn Ultimatum
programme.desc: Danny discovers the rarest Cadillac collection he's ever seen. Later, Horny Mike has 30 days to move his big ugly bus from the shop's parking lot before Danny has it sent to the dump.

programme.title: Counting Cars: '70s Scoot
programme.desc: Danny takes on a psychedelic chopper project that is so '70s cool, he's worried he might not be able to give it to the customer when it's done. Later, he hits the streets to check out a pair of classic Mini Coopers and a rare Split Bumper Camaro.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Sweet Lambo of Mine

programme.desc: Ryan, Mike and Shannon convince Danny to sponsor them in a 24-hour endurance race called The LeMons. This race pits cheap hunks of junk against each other deep in the Arizona desert. Meanwhile, Danny has the guys work on a special one of a kind project.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The Fast and the Ridiculous Part Two
programme.desc: The guys finally find a not so perfect car for the Arizona Lemons race; a beat up old racer, once owned by Shannon. With a little begging and very little cash they buy it back. Next they resurrect the Junker as the 'Counts Bloody Mess.'

programme.title: Counting Cars: Counts of Hazzard
programme.desc: Guitarist DJ Ashba stops by the shop to have Danny work on his 100 year old Model-T rat rod. Then, the crew are commissioned to build a 21st century version of the iconic General Lee Dodge Charger from the 'Dukes of Hazzard' TV show.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of Egypt's Mega Temple

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Lost Skyscrapers

programme.title: Unearthed: Ramses' Buried Treasures

programme.title: Unearthed: Pompeii's Evil Twin
programme.desc: The lost city of Baiae was the Las Vegas of the ancient world, until a mysterious calamity caused it to sink into the sea. New discoveries reveal the secrets of this sin city that, like Pompeii, some experts believe was destroyed by a supervolcano.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hitler's Battleship of Doom
programme.desc: When satellites detect a strange underwater structure in the Arctic Circle, experts suspect it could be part of Hitler's prized World War II battleship. Using cutting-edge tech they investigate the secret history of this nightmare vessel.

programme.title: What on Earth?: CIA Killer Monks
programme.desc: Something strange in the Himalayas could be evidence of a top-secret CIA program to turn monks into killer agents, and cutting-edge science helps experts investigate the truth behind this mysterious anomaly.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Temple of Blood
programme.desc: An ancient man-made volcano might reveal buried treasure and bloody human sacrifice. When NASA discovers a strange pattern in the Arctic ice, experts investigate if it has alien origins. A mystery in the Sahara might have a sinister explanation.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Secrets of the Sahara
programme.desc: In 1965, a beautiful 25 mile structure called the Eye of the Sahara was found from space. Its formation is still unknown. Then, a terrifying new weather weapon could be discovered from clouds emanating from an island in the Indian Ocean.

programme.title: What on Earth?: CIA Killer Monks
programme.desc: Something strange in the Himalayas could be evidence of a top-secret CIA program to turn monks into killer agents, and cutting-edge science helps experts investigate the truth behind this mysterious anomaly.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Imhotep's Lost Labyrinth

programme.title: City Confidential: Durham: Dangerous Housewife
programme.desc: A philandering and big-spending wife is suspected of killing her husband to get his money.

programme.title: Escaping Evil: My Life in a Cult: Pilot
programme.desc: Leslie Wagner-Wilson spent her formative years as a member of the People's Temple under the guidance of Jim Jones. When the church uproots amidst scandal and settles in Guyana, Leslie is convinced to follow.

programme.title: Escaping Evil: My Life in a Cult
programme.desc: Flora Jessop was born at the bottom of an oppressive hierarchy established by the Fundamentalist Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, or the FLDS. Growing up in Colorado City, Arizona, she suffered greatly at the hands of her father.

programme.title: Escaping Evil: My Life in a Cult
programme.desc: A man blindly follows god-like cult leader Yahweh Ben Yahweh even when Yahweh unleashes a bloody campaign of murders and beheadings. He maintains his devotion until Yahweh's tyranny and violence is turned against his devoted follower.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Nothing Good Happens After Midnight
programme.desc: The Task force realizes that finding cars are not their only job. They take down robbers, and then search for a man with a gun.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: These Are the Streets
programme.desc: Stolen jeep followed; individuals are captured and a gun is recovered.

programme.title: American Monster: Falling Down
programme.desc: Alene and George Jenkins are the perfect couple living a perfect life. When their desire for children leads them to adopt a son and a daughter it seems their family is complete. But instead it triggers a dark spiral ending in an unspeakably awful crime.

programme.title: American Monster: Backyard Daddy
programme.desc: In Ogden, Utah, Stephen and Becky Vargas appear to have it all. Behind the picture perfect life seen in these rare home videos, jealousy and control issues are abound. But no one thought their marriage would end - in murder.

programme.title: American Monster: A Mother's Work
programme.desc: Never-before-seen home movies reveal the fabulous lifestyle of Lanny and Donna Horwitz raising their only son Radley in their Florida mansion. But when their lives are upended by a ghastly shooting, everyone in this eccentric family becomes a suspect.

programme.title: American Monster: Life of the Party
programme.desc: Doug and Rose quickly strike up a romance and later marry. But behind the perfect façade seen in these exclusive home videos, lies and deceit begin to surface. A no show at Thanksgiving and a box on the roadside lead to a shocking discovery.

programme.title: What Happened to Kortne Stouffer?
programme.desc: In the summer of 2012, Kortne Stouffer vanishes from her bed while a friend sleeps beside her. News of Kortne's disappearance rocks her small Pennsylvania town.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: The Gentleman Killer
programme.desc: Bronx, NY, 1941: When tea for two becomes a murder of one, investigators from all across New York City must act upon the testimony of a few brave women to bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: Devil's Advocate
programme.desc: St. Paul, MN, 1963: Carol Thompson, church-going wife and devoted mother of four, is found in a bloody heap on her neighbor's doorstep. Now detectives must peel away the layers of her picture-perfect life to reveal the painful secrets the 1960s housewife.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: In Cold Blood
programme.desc: When an unthinkably violent criminal flees before his trial, John Walsh joins local authorities on the chase for Michael Waguespack. Cal uncovers hidden and painful truths in a Christmas Eve tragedy that sent police hunting for Miguel Angel Martinez.

programme.desc: Bronx, NY, 1941: When tea for two becomes a murder of one, investigators from all across New York City must act upon the testimony of a few brave women to bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: Devil's Advocate
programme.desc: St. Paul, MN, 1963: Carol Thompson, church-going wife and devoted mother of four, is found in a bloody heap on her neighbor's doorstep. Now detectives must peel away the layers of her picture-perfect life to reveal the painful secrets the 1960s housewife.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: In Cold Blood
programme.desc: When an unthinkably violent criminal flees before his trial, John Walsh joins local authorities on the chase for Michael Waguespack. Cal uncovers hidden and painful truths in a Christmas Eve tragedy that sent police hunting for Miguel Angel Martinez.

programme.title: What Happened to Kortne Stouffer?
programme.desc: In the summer of 2012, Kortne Stouffer vanishes from her bed while a friend sleeps beside her. News of Kortne's disappearance rocks her small Pennsylvania town.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Trailing the Devil
programme.desc: A nightmare wreaks havoc on the village of Armada, Michigan when 14-year-old April Millsap is found murdered on the community's most popular bike trail. Very little evidence leaves investigators running down clues to bring this monster to justice.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Prints of Darkness
programme.desc: When Michael and Melisa Augustson move to little Alma, Georgia they're soon taken in by the community. But on December 14th, Michael comes home to a scene of unspeakable horror. His wife has been murdered, and only one person in the town knows why.

programme.title: Deadly Devotion: Murderous Mormons
programme.desc: Two brothers believe they have finally broken free from a dangerous Mormon fundamental cult and its egomaniacal leader. Then, nearly two decades later, a deadly hit from a prison cell brings them right back into the fold.

programme.title: Deadly Devotion: Highway to Hell
programme.desc: When a mysterious biker invites single mother Cynthia Garcia to an exclusive party at the Hells Angels clubhouse, she unwittingly enters a secret and dangerous world… with a sacred code that the outlaw bikers would kill to uphold.

programme.title: Deadly Devotion: Killer Party
programme.desc: Misfit Andre "Angel" Melendez moves to New York City, longing to belong to the outrageous party world of Michael Alig's Club Kids, and instead finds a dark and menacing underground scene where fame and drug addiction have tragic consequences.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Suburban Tragedy
programme.desc: In August 2008, newlywed Sarah Widmer died in one of two ways: either she was taking a bath and drowned, or her husband Ryan killed her. Chris Anderson and Fatima Silva investigate to see if there's enough evidence to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: A Desperate Daughter
programme.desc: A down and out twenty-something is convicted of brutally murdering her parents for money. Now, the convict's cousin has reached out to Chris and Fatima for help, convinced Virginia Twenter is serving time for a crime she did not commit.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Hero or Killer?
programme.desc: In Dayton, Ohio in 1991, 15-year-old David Clark was convicted of setting a house on fire that killed a 12-year-old girl. Now, two of his sisters have called Chris and Fatima in to investigate and help them prove this was a wrongful conviction.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: The Truck Driver's Wife
programme.desc: Perry Mikell admits he was a serial cheater incapable of monogamy, but he insists that doesn't mean he killed his wife in a seedy motel room. Now, Mikell's sister and fiancée have called in Chris Anderson and Fatima Silva to see if they got the wrong man.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: A Dying Plea
programme.desc: 16 years after Jerome Scott was found stabbed to death in his home, police moved in on his ex-wife, Patricia Wright, claiming she killed him out of rage for money. Now, her sister and daughter are on a crusade to prove the wrong person is behind bars.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Convicted by a Hair
programme.desc: In 2011, 19-year old KC Grondin got his first girlfriend, but later that same year, he was charged with her murder. Chris Anderson and Fatima Silva have been called in by KC's passionate parents, who are convinced he was the victim of a rush to judgment.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: High-Stakes Homicide
programme.desc: Pest control worker Kim Cain was convicted of murdering a 71-year-old Palm Beach socialite. The prosecution argued she found Cain stealing her jewelry to support a gambling addiction. Cain's family is hoping Chris and Fatima can prove his innocence.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Kandahar: Against All Odds
programme.desc: 36 U.S Special Forces face a Taliban insurgence 5 times their size. Facing I.E.Ds , RPG's and vicious counter attacks, they fight for their lives to take the hill of Sperwan Ghar, as control of the hill is control of Kandahar.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Hue: Vietnam's Bloodiest Battle
programme.desc: In a final showdown marines must breech the heavily fortified walls of the ancient citadel where thousands of NVA soldiers lie in wait. After one of the bloodiest battles of the entire Vietnam War, the marines are finally victorious.

programme.title: The Mafia Kingpin
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and the the model for running crime business.

programme.title: The Last Don
programme.desc: Joe Massino, the 'Last Don', crushes anyone who goes against the mafia code of omerta. Loyalty to his family, and obedience to their code of silence, is everything. But when the Feds take Massino down, Massino takes everyone down with him.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Santo Trafficante
programme.desc: Florida and Cuba were ruled by top don Santo Trafficante. The King of Cuba's casinos was on the verge of mob stardom when a revolution destroyed his plans. It results in a secret alliance between the mob and the CIA and a failed assassination attempt.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Downfall
programme.desc: The FBI pursues the five families that run organized crime in New York, and what happens when the fate of the two informers is revealed.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Joey Gallo
programme.desc: Crazy Joey Gallo psychopathic killer, beatnik hipster and renegade mobster. Burning with rage and determined to make his way to the top, he wages all-out war against the US gov't and sparks a revolution in the mafia before going down in a hail of bullets.

programme.title: The Mafia Kingpin
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and the the model for running crime business.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: Greatest Tank Battles: Tank Battles of Korea
programme.desc: In 1950 the world is caught off guard as North Korea launches a massive armoured assault into South Korea. This is the story of the American tankers who rush to the aid of the South and the bloody battles they fight up and down the Korean Peninsula.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Battle for Sugar Loaf
programme.desc: Taking an otherwise nondescript hill on the embattled island of Okinawa proved to be one of the most incredible battles of WWII. The young weary marines of Charlie Company strained against the searing Pacific sun to see the top of Sugar Loaf Hill.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Heroes of Tarawa
programme.desc: Everything went wrong in America's first test of whether the Japanese-held islands of the Pacific, the key steppingstones to the doorstep of Japan, could be captured by across-the-beach infantry assaults.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Marines at Hue
programme.desc: The city of Hue, South Vietnam, was the site of one of the fiercest battles of the Vietnam War. Three under-strength U.S. Marine battalions, consisting of fewer than 2,500 men, attacked and soundly defeated overwhelming, entrenched enemy troops.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Tojo: Japan's Razor of Fear
programme.desc: Japanese General, Hideki Tojo, is a cold blooded control freak, who takes millions to their deaths in the dirtiest war ever known. This is the story of the dictator responsible for Pearl Harbor, an Asian Holocaust and the torture of thousands of POWs.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Kim: North Korea's Evil Dynasty
programme.desc: North Korea's evil dictator, Kim Jong-il, ruled his country for 17 years without mercy. While personally enriching himself, he let his people starve to death and threatened to bring the world to the brink of a third world war.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Heirloom Home on the Shore

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Daggett Camp
programme.desc: Chase and team take on the Daggett Camp, which was owned by a famous Maine politician whose family wants to rehab it in only six weeks. A hidden surprise underneath the cabin threatens to derail the whole project.
