programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Grand Exterior
programme.desc: Nicole makes a spur-of-the-moment bid and wins a house sight-unseen at auction. Nicole visits the six bedroom, three bath manor and falls in love with its historic details and rustic charm.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Powder Room With a Flair
programme.desc: Nicole knows that a ground floor powder room will see a ton of guests.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Grand Dining Room
programme.desc: Nicole tackles the dining room of her Tudor home using custom leaded glass and modern oak flooring.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Rebuild Below
programme.desc: A dark basement that could have easily been overlooked as an unsalvageable and unusable space is transformed into a gorgeous family room.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Grand Living Room
programme.desc: Nicole's newest home is 100 years old, and unsurprisingly the living room needs work from top to bottom. Despite major setbacks, Nicole is up for the challenge.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Overhaul
programme.desc: When it comes to restoring kitchens, Nicole Curtis' rule is that it should look old and work like new. In her Grand Blvd. home, she has to work with a large kitchen that offers little wall space.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Leaky Bedroom Disaster
programme.desc: A fresh window seat, antique glass knobs, and a stairwell re-do get Nicole closer to finishing her grand 2nd floor.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Solarium Refresh
programme.desc: Once a boarded-up eyesore, Nicole's first-floor solarium has the potential to be the best room in the house.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Jack and Jill Suite
programme.desc: With the help of a 1920s mint condition porcelain sink, Nicole is able to transform the Jack and Jill bathroom in her Grand Boulevard home without sacrificing its antique integrity.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Master Bath Overhaul
programme.desc: If Nicole is going to turn the entire third floor of her Grand Boulevard estate into a master suite, a custom new bathroom will have to be the first step.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Rehab Attic
programme.desc: Nicole's 1913 mansion in the heart of Detroit is topped with an old, dusty attic that was once servant's quarters.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Grand Garage
programme.desc: The century-old Tudor house is one thing, but Nicole Curtis also wants to make sure the garage is up to par.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Debates, Decisions, Designer
programme.desc: The leaching bed is replaced at the country house, and work progresses until Mike and MJ find out an open permit remains on the barn. Later, the big day finally arrives when MJ and Lisa get married in a picturesque setting, as long as the rain holds off.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Here We Go Again
programme.desc: After MJ and Lisa's wedding, smooth sailing is wishful thinking as Mike and MJ are welcomed back to the river house by a river of muck. The deck posts and windows get installed as they rush to get the house closed in before the winter weather arrives.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Game Changer
programme.desc: Mike's vision for open concept at the suburban house hits a structural snag and MJ attempts to rein him in before the budget takes another hit. A fun surprise awaits the team at the river house, until Mike throws another curveball at MJ.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Alton Crown Affair
programme.desc: Alton Brown proves that crown roast of lamb can be a dish to shock and awe.

programme.title: Good Eats: Ginger: Rise of the Rhizome
programme.desc: When a fairy tale figure seeks host Alton Brown's help in spicing up his personality, it leads to the exploration of that zesty rhizome ginger.

programme.title: Good Eats: Et Tu Mame
programme.desc: That culinary chameleon the soybean turns up as edamame when host Alton Brown takes it from the sushi bar and into the kitchen.

programme.title: Good Eats: Tuna, Surprise!
programme.desc: Alton Brown raises the bar on canned tuna beyond the usual casserole or tuna sandwich.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Flay vs. Stein
programme.desc: Chicago-based Chef Todd Stein enters Kitchen Stadium to take on Iron Chef Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: London: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Andrew highlights the iconic British dishes and ethnically diverse foods that have put London on the culinary map, from humble shepherd's pie and posh beef Wellington to sizzling seekh kebabs and smoky Jamaican jerk chicken.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dominican Republic
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern takes a culinary tour of the Dominican Republic, a meat-lover's paradise. From whole roast pig and crispy, Lebanese-inspired fried dough pockets to beef and plantain casseroles, Dominican gastronomy is full of surprises.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern uncovers the boardwalk indulgences of the Jersey Shore. From sticky-sweet saltwater taffy, to slices of tomato pie and Italian subs, the Jersey Shore's culinary scene is a carnival for the taste buds.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Quito
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the diverse culinary classics of Ecuador's capital city, Quito. The urban cuisine satisfies stomachs with fried pork and potato cakes, fresh ceviche, sugar-coated roasted peanuts, fish soup and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Atlanta
programme.desc: In the modern city known for its southern hospitality, Atlanta's comfort food is king. From fried chicken and peach cobbler to soul food and sweet tea, Andrew Zimmern explores the iconic eats that keep the hungry heading south.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mexico City
programme.desc: Mexico City has the most people of any city in the western hemisphere, and they all love to eat. Home to some of the best street food on Earth, Andrew Zimmern explores tasty traditions like barbacoa, chicharrone and huarache.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: 3, 2, 1/ Shirley Keeper

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: Legend of Isla Nublar: Stampede!
programme.desc: While stranded in the jungle during a massive storm, Claire and Simon unknowingly stumble upon a clue to the whereabouts of the treasure sought by Sinjin.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: The Masked Magician/ The Big Bash
programme.desc: Timmy wishes for Magician powers to perform at the fair; Cupid has a party at his house.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Crash Nebula
programme.desc: How Crash Nebula came to be.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Man vs. Sewer/ The Mutant Menace
programme.desc: Ralph is separated and left alone during the Turtles' lazy river ride through the sewers. And, all of New York is turned against the Turtles after failed attempts to do good deeds.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Turtledega Nights: The Ballad of Rat Man/ The Ancient Art of Ninja Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Splinter enters the Turtle Tank in a demolition derby. And, Splinter teaches his sons the Art of Ninja Concealment.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Shell in a Cell/ Minotaur Maze
programme.desc: Leo unseats Raph’s idol as pro wrestling champion of the world./ Beat the mutant maze in 30 minutes or less and the pizza is free.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Amphibia: Snow Day/ Cracking Mrs. Croaker
programme.desc: When a winter cold snap freezes all the frogs in Wartwood, Anne must protect the townspeople. In an effort to make Mrs. Croaker like him, Sprig digs up a secret from her past.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp
programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Contagi-Anne/ Family Shrub
programme.desc: Anne fakes getting sick to get off work, but the rest of the family gets sick. Sprig and Polly think their family history is boring, until they uncover family secrets.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Marki-Fired!
programme.desc: Cupquake tries out parenthood in Mother Simulator, Markiplier tries to stay employed in Job Simulator, and Jack enters the gungeon.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: The Takeover
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Creepover Party/ Frankenstein and Son
programme.desc: Crabby’s first winning streak leads to a sponsorship deal… with Plunderman Industries? Later Ace creates a Scrammer using Sloane’s cherished childhood plaything… to disastrous results.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Adventures in Vampiresitting/ Phlegm Ball
programme.desc: The kids get trapped in a human house. Mavis' cousin shows up and challenges her to a game of phlegm ball.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Drop the Needle/ Really Gross Anatomy
programme.desc: Mavis agrees to teach Klaus to bat out if he shows her how to replace the needle on Aunt Lydia's gramophone. Dr. Gillman gets an education on medicine from Mavis and the crew, though no one really has much knowledge on the subject.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Bat Flap Fever/ Thumb and Thumber
programme.desc: Mavis is horrified by her dad's new Mavy-Wavy fashion wings.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Inspiration! Challenging Valt!
programme.desc: Blading superstar Valt Aoi visits Dante for a friendly battle before opening the Bey Carnival; once the tournament begins, the Victories will need to get the hang of the Hyper Stadium if they hope to win.

programme.title: Yo-Kai Watch: Hapyon Detective Agency: Case No. 6: Assault of the Thorny Yo-Kai
programme.desc: A boy named Nate find a capsule which give him a Yo-Kai watch for identifying Yo-Kai.

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: From Z to Shining Z
DuckTales: The Dangerous Chemistry of Gandra Dee!
programme.desc: With Huey and Webby’s help, Fenton woos a punk rock scientist, only to uncover her dangerous plans for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Hardlight
programme.desc: Now fugitives, Big Hero 6 lay low as the SFPD searches for them. However, new villain Hardlight shows up hoping to challenge Big Hero 6 to a real-life videogame duel.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Soos and the Real Girl
programme.desc: When Soos finds himself in need of a date for his cousin Reggie's engagement party, he looks to a dating simulator game to help him talk to girls.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Shark Objects / Dream Weaver
programme.desc: When Greens try to spend an eventful day at the beach, Cricket tries to prank the beach-goers; Cricket discovers he can influence the family's dreams to disastrous real-life results.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Park Pandemonium/ Cricket's Biscuits
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Stanchurian Candidate
programme.desc: When Grunkle Stan decides to run for mayor, Dipper and Mabel have their work cut out for them trying to turn their gaffe-prone uncle into the perfect candidate.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp
programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.title: DuckTales: Friendship Hates Magic!
programme.desc: Stuck as a shadow, Lena tries to protect Webby from her suspicious new friend Violet during a supernatural sleepover.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Tourist Trapped
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Carpet Diem
programme.desc: Mabel finds a way to swap minds with Dipper and the townsfolk, so she uses her new found ability to make a difference in people's lives.

programme.title: SportsCenter Featured: Dog Day Special
programme.desc: A compilation of popular and touching dog-related features.

programme.title: SportsCenter Featured: A Mountain to Climb
programme.desc: The journey of Pratima Sherpa, a 17-year-old girl who was raised in a maintenance shed behind the third green on the Royal Nepal Golf Club and aspires to become Nepal's first female professional golfer.

programme.title: SportsCenter Featured: Gift From the Groves
programme.desc: The hardships of picking oranges in the fields of Florida and how they delivered former Clemson cornerback Mackensie Alexander to the NFL.

programme.title: SportsCenter Featured: 6-Man
programme.desc: Played at more than 250 high schools in Texas, six-man football is often the lifeblood of tiny communities around the state. An exploration of the games, towns, and people of the unique sport.

programme.title: SportsCenter Featured: Pin Kings
programme.desc: Two high school wrestling teammates, Alex DeCubas and Kevin Pedersen, and how their lives intersected through the world of drug trafficking, law enforcement and sports.

programme.title: E:60
programme.desc: ESPN's award-winning Sunday morning sports magazine show, featuring the biggest names and best stories in sports.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Drew Bledsoe: Better With Age
programme.desc: An unfiltered interview with former number one draft pick Drew Bledsoe, on living in the shadow of the Tom Brady dynasty, the tackle that nearly cost him his life and how he's found peace as a successful winemaker.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Hilinski's Hope
programme.desc: Seven months after the death of Washington State QB Tyler Hilinski, his parents cope with their grief and memories.

programme.title: E:60 Profile: Mike Leach
programme.desc: Jeremy Schaap spends time with one of the most unique personalities in college football, Washington State head coach Mike Leach.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Paradise: From the Ashes
programme.desc: The emotional journey of the Paradise High School football team, one year removed from the wildfires that scorched their town and claimed 86 lives. E:60 follows the Paradise Bobcats on their path to rebuild.

programme.title: UFC Main Event: Jedrzejczyk vs. Letourneau
programme.desc: Joanna Jedrzejczyk had a great opportunity to gain some recognition as a co-headliner at UFC 193, and she did just that: successfully defended her belt against Valerie Letourneau in the co-main event in Melbourne, Australia.

programme.title: UFC Main Event: Jedrzejczyk vs. Gadelha 2
programme.desc: Strawweight champion Joanna Jedrzejczyk and challenger Claudia Gadelha's shared history gave rise to an intense rivalry. Follow the path from their first fight through a season as coaches on The Ultimate Fighter, then see the exciting rematch.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: What Lies Beneath: The Mick Fanning Story
programme.desc: Mick Fanning survived a shark attack on live television and that's just where his story begins.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Owen and Haatchi
programme.desc: This is a story about a boy and his dog. But not just any boy, and not just any dog.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Love Is Stronger
programme.desc: An exclusive interview with Chris Singleton, a 19-year old outfielder for Charleston Southern University, whose mother and eight others were shot and killed in the Charleston Emanuel AME church massacre in 2015.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: 20 Years and 11 Seconds: The Travis Roy Story
programme.desc: Tom Rinaldi visits former Boston University hockey player Travis Roy, whose life was forever changed just 11 seconds into his first shift for the Terriers.

programme.title: Backstory: Serena vs. The Umpire
programme.desc: A look at the saga of Serena Williams' intense clash with chair umpire Carlos Ramos during her loss to Naomi Osaka in the 2018 US Open women's final.

programme.title: Backstory: Banned For Life*
programme.desc: Don Van Natta Jr. examines Major League Baseball’s punishments of 'Shoeless' Joe Jackson and Pete Rose with new reporting and fresh interviews, exploring what’s changed since they were each banned from the sport.

programme.title: SportsCenter Top Ten
programme.desc: A countdown of the top ten plays of the month.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Catching Kayla
programme.desc: Tom Rinaldi tells the remarkable story of Kayla Montgomery who, despite being diagnosed with multiple sclerosis, has become one of the best distance runners in the country.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Paradise: From the Ashes
programme.desc: The emotional journey of the Paradise High School football team, one year removed from the wildfires that scorched their town and claimed 86 lives. E:60 follows the Paradise Bobcats on their path to rebuild.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: The Marriage Doctor
programme.desc: When Mike finds out his future son-in-law Kyle fears meeting with the church's new minister, Mike tells Kyle to use him and Vanessa as a strong marriage example. But a recent argument ends up sending them to the minister instead.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: The Shortcut
programme.desc: In honour of Mike's 25 years at The Outdoor Man, Ed plans a surprise dinner for him and asks Joe and Chuck to each give a speech. Also, Mandy decides that in order for her and Kyle to save money, they should move in with her parents after they're married.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Enjoy Those Garlic Balls
programme.desc: Alan attempts to push Judith's new relationship with Dr. Melnick to the next level.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Bag Full of Jawea
programme.desc: Charlie attempts to keep Jake from being suspended from school by wooing his teacher.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Routine
programme.desc: Joey and the gang get invited by Janine to the advance taping of a New Year's special.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Apothecary Table
programme.desc: Joey is angered by Janine's snobby attitude and utter contempt for all his friends.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: The First and Last Ride-Along
programme.desc: Molly decides writing a crime novel will be her new career, so she goes on a ride-along with Mike to research a book she wants to pen.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Sex and Death
programme.desc: Molly has a 'mind blowing' experience when she goes to Victoria’s workplace, a funeral home, to research her novel. Meanwhile, Mike sneaks a peek at Molly’s writing when she’s out.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: I Can't Afford Hyenas
programme.desc: Charlie discovers that his accountant is inept and his debts are all overdue. While Alan convinces Charlie to cut his spending, Charlie teaches Jake about sports gambling.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Back Off, Mary Poppins
programme.desc: When Alan learns that Charlie belongs to an exclusive male support group, he begs to join.

programme.title: Mom: Fireballs and Bullet Holes
programme.desc: Christy tries to start a relationship with her father, while Bonnie struggles to accept that Christy wants him in her life.

programme.title: Mom: Nietzsche and a Beer Run
programme.desc: Christy is tempted by her old vices when she dates an attractive, hard-partying man. Meanwhile, Bonnie decides her advice is worth money and becomes a life coach.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Joke
programme.desc: Ross and Chandler bicker over a joke that Ross successfully submitted to Playboy.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Rachel's Sister
programme.desc: Rachel tries to help her sister Jill find her independence, but she flirts with disaster.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Chandler Can't Cry
programme.desc: Rachel forces Ross to cancel his date with her sister; Phoebe is mistaken for a porn star.

programme.title: Friends: The One That Could Have Been
programme.desc: All of the friends ponder what might have been if each had taken a different path in life.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather: It’s Been Nice Snowing You
programme.desc: A skier hits the slopes…with his face, a monkey does his monkey 'business' on a girl’s back, and a girl’s pole dance brings down the house…literally.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather: It’s a Wind Wind Situation
programme.desc: A bug makes an emergency landing in a weather reporter’s mouth, an excited dog takes his owner for a drag, and a paragliding groom crashes his own wedding.

programme.title: Wipeout: Big Balls of the Caribbean
programme.desc: The contestants face the 'Squashbuckler' and the 'Backyard BBQ.'

programme.title: In Search Ministries
programme.desc: Every worldview involves faith in some form; a commitment to applying reason and evidence to our search for ultimate answers to life's big questions.

programme.title: Freethought Matters: Dan Barker Songbook Show 1
programme.desc: Dan Barker Songbook Show.

programme.title: Elementary: Step Nine
programme.desc: Holmes and Watson travel to London to help track down an old mentor and investigate an unsolved mystery. Meanwhile, Sherlock's estranged brother reunites with him and reveals some secrets of his own.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Ho-ly K.I.T.T.
programme.desc: Murray and Uncle Marvin bond over their love of 'Knight Rider' and attend the Philadelphia Thanksgiving Day parade to see K.I.T.T. in person.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The Greatest Musical Ever Written
programme.desc: Barry makes fun of Adam for wanting to be in theatre, but he suddenly becomes jealous when he discovers Adam and Lainey were cast in roles where they kiss each other. Barry joins the stage crew to sabotage the production.

programme.title: Right This Minute

programme.title: Movie: Crazy, Stupid, Love.

programme.title: Avenue 5
programme.desc: A luxury cruise vessel travels the solar system in this sci-fi comedy.

programme.title: Curb Your Enthusiasm: The Surprise Party
programme.desc: When Susie plans a surprise party for Jeff, Larry suspects she has ulterior motives, and enlists the help of his new friend Wally to ensure things don’t go awry. Larry connects with a problematic inventor to develop an innovative new product.

programme.title: Movie: Gone Fishin'
programme.desc: Two buddies win a vacation and get involved with a con who ripped off his ex-wives.

programme.title: Movie: Rock the Kasbah
programme.desc: A has-been rock manager gets stranded in Afghanistan, where he discovers a young girl with a beautiful singing voice. Sure that she could win a national singing competition, he takes her on an adventure-of-a-lifetime in the hopes of reviving his career.

programme.title: Movie: Wedding Daze
programme.desc: After losing the woman of his dreams, a man is convinced he'll never fall in love again. His best friend dares him to propose to a waitress. The dare evolves into the kind of love that both have been looking for all along.

programme.title: Movie: Big
programme.desc: A boy awakens as a full-grown man but is not ready to face the adult world.

programme.title: Movie: Crazy, Stupid, Love.

programme.title: Movie: The Hudsucker Proxy
programme.desc: A naïve Indiana boy goes to New York in 1958 to sell his idea for the hula hoop.

programme.title: Movie: Jingle All the Way
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, a father is searching all over town for a toy for his son. While his son is at home wondering where he is, the neighbour is hitting on his wife.

programme.title: Movie: Corky Romano
programme.desc: The black sheep of a mob family pretends to be a thug to help his dad infiltrate the FBI.

programme.title: Movie: Picture Perfect
programme.desc: In order to get ahead at work, a young advertising executive pretends she's engaged. She must then convince a recent acquaintance to act the part during an important meeting with her boss.

programme.title: Movie: Reality Bites
programme.desc: Four friends face the promise and pitfalls of life in the 1990s when they share a house.

programme.title: Movie: Johnny English
programme.desc: An inept agent bungles his way through an investigation that uncovers a sinister plot.

programme.title: Movie: Witless Protection
programme.desc: A small town sheriff tries to rescue a girl who he thought was being kidnapped. He learns that the kidnappers are FBI agents who are actually trying to kill the girl.

programme.title: Movie: A Fish Called Wanda
programme.desc: In London, four very different people team up to commit armed robbery, then try to double-cross each other for the loot. Wanda grows closer to an English lawyer in an attempt to locate the stolen diamonds.
